---
title: "Unified Perinatal Dataset Pipeline v10.15"
author: "Joseph Akuze (LSHTM)"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    df_print: paged
    code_folding: show
version: '10.15'
subtitle: "Data Harmonization for Stillbirth and Neonatal Death Prediction in Sub-Saharan Africa"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10, fig.height = 6
)

# ============================================================================
# REQUIRED PACKAGES
# ============================================================================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(lubridate)
  library(janitor)
  library(readxl)
  library(haven)
  library(tools)
  library(knitr)
})

# ============================================================================
# GLOBAL CONSTANTS
# ============================================================================
VERSION <- "10.15"

# EXPECTED STUDY YEARS - FOR VALIDATION
EXPECTED_YEARS <- list(
  WHOMCS = c(2010, 2011),
  `EN-INDEPTH` = c(2017, 2018),
  NCOPS = c(2018, 2019),
  ALERT = c(2021, 2023, 2024),
  PRECISE = c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023),
  PTBi = c(2016, 2017, 2018, 2019)
)
```

# Phase 0: Setup and Configuration

## 0.1 File Path Configuration

```{r phase0-config}
# ============================================================================
# FILE PATH CONFIGURATION
# ============================================================================
USE_FULL_DATA <- TRUE  # DEFAULT REQUIRED

if (USE_FULL_DATA) {
  FILE_NCOPS    <- "data/ncops_merged.csv"
  FILE_ALERT    <- "data/ALERT_dataset.dta"
  FILE_PRECISE  <- "data/PRECISE_dataset.dta"
  FILE_PTBI     <- "data/PTBI_dataset1.dta"
  FILE_ENINDEPTH <- "data/EN-INDEPTH_dataset.dta"
  FILE_WHOMCS   <- "data/WHOMCS_dataset.dta"
  # SES / wealth quintile linked files
  FILE_PRECISE_SES <- "data/PRECISE_SES.dta"
  FILE_NCOPS_SES   <- "data/SES_wealth_quintiles.dta"
} else {
  FILE_NCOPS    <- "/mnt/project/ncops_sample.csv"
  FILE_ALERT    <- "/mnt/project/ALERT_sample.csv"
  FILE_PRECISE  <- "/mnt/project/PRECISE_sample.csv"
  FILE_PTBI     <- "/mnt/project/PTBi_sample.csv"
  FILE_ENINDEPTH <- "/mnt/project/ENINDEPTH_sample.csv"
  FILE_WHOMCS   <- "/mnt/project/whomcs_sample.csv"
  # SES / wealth quintile linked files
  FILE_PRECISE_SES <- "/mnt/project/PRECISE_SES_sample.csv"
  FILE_NCOPS_SES   <- "/mnt/project/ses_ncops.csv"
}

dir.create("intermediate", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create("output", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

cat("=== FILE PATH CONFIGURATION ===\n")
cat(sprintf("Using %s data\n", ifelse(USE_FULL_DATA, "FULL", "SAMPLE")))
cat(sprintf("NCOPS:      %s\n", FILE_NCOPS))
cat(sprintf("ALERT:      %s\n", FILE_ALERT))
cat(sprintf("PRECISE:    %s\n", FILE_PRECISE))
cat(sprintf("PTBi:       %s\n", FILE_PTBI))
cat(sprintf("EN-INDEPTH: %s\n", FILE_ENINDEPTH))
cat(sprintf("WHOMCS:     %s\n", FILE_WHOMCS))
cat(sprintf("PRECISE SES:%s\n", FILE_PRECISE_SES))
cat(sprintf("NCOPS SES:  %s\n", FILE_NCOPS_SES))
```

## 0.2 Utility Functions

```{r phase0-utilities}
# ============================================================================
# FLEXIBLE DATA LOADING FUNCTION
# ============================================================================
safe_load_data <- function(filepath, encoding = "UTF-8") {
  if (!file.exists(filepath)) {
    warning(sprintf("File not found: %s", filepath))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(filepath))
  
  tryCatch({
    df <- switch(ext,
      "csv" = {
        tryCatch(
          readr::read_csv(filepath, show_col_types = FALSE, 
                         locale = locale(encoding = encoding)),
          error = function(e) {
            message(sprintf("Retrying %s with latin1 encoding...", basename(filepath)))
            tryCatch(
              readr::read_csv(filepath, show_col_types = FALSE, 
                             locale = locale(encoding = "latin1")),
              error = function(e2) {
                message("Retrying with cp1252...")
                readr::read_csv(filepath, show_col_types = FALSE,
                               locale = locale(encoding = "cp1252"))
              }
            )
          }
        )
      },
      "dta" = haven::read_dta(filepath),
      "xlsx" = readxl::read_excel(filepath),
      "xls" = readxl::read_excel(filepath),
      "rds" = readRDS(filepath),
      {
        warning(sprintf("Unknown extension '%s', attempting read_csv", ext))
        readr::read_csv(filepath, show_col_types = FALSE)
      }
    )
    
    df <- janitor::clean_names(df)
    message(sprintf("✓ Loaded %s: %d rows x %d cols", basename(filepath), nrow(df), ncol(df)))
    return(df)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(sprintf("✗ Failed to load %s: %s", filepath, e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# ============================================================================
# SAFE COLUMN ACCESS FUNCTIONS
# ============================================================================
get_col <- function(df, col_name, default = NA) {
  if (col_name %in% names(df)) {
    return(df[[col_name]])
  } else {
    return(rep(default, nrow(df)))
  }
}

get_col_chr <- function(df, col_name) {
  if (col_name %in% names(df)) {
    return(as.character(df[[col_name]]))
  } else {
    return(rep(NA_character_, nrow(df)))
  }
}

get_col_num <- function(df, col_name) {
  if (col_name %in% names(df)) {
    return(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[col_name]])))
  } else {
    return(rep(NA_real_, nrow(df)))
  }
}

# ============================================================================
# STRING AND DATE UTILITIES
# ============================================================================
as_yesno <- function(x) {
  x0 <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  case_when(
    is.na(x) ~ NA_character_,
    x0 %in% c("yes", "y", "1", "true", "t") ~ "Yes",
    x0 %in% c("no", "n", "0", "false", "f") ~ "No",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

parse_date_multi <- function(x) {
  if (inherits(x, "Date")) return(x)
  if (inherits(x, "POSIXct") || inherits(x, "POSIXt")) return(as_date(x))
  x_chr <- as.character(x)
  suppressWarnings({
    d <- parse_date_time(x_chr, orders = c(
      "dmy", "dmY", "Ymd", "mdY", "ymd HMS", "dmy HMS", "mdy", 
      "B d, Y", "d B Y", "dBY", "dby", "dbY"
    ), quiet = TRUE)
  })
  as_date(d)
}

## ★ v10.15 Fix: Stata datetime (tc) converter for CSV data
## Stata clock time = milliseconds since 1960-01-01 00:00:00
## Used for ALERT q23birth which is stored as Stata datetime in .dta
## but appears as raw numeric in CSV exports
parse_stata_datetime <- function(x) {
  x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  result <- as.Date(as.POSIXct(x_num / 1000, origin = "1960-01-01", tz = "UTC"))
  # Validate: reasonable date range only
  result[is.na(result) | result < as.Date("1900-01-01") | result > as.Date("2030-12-31")] <- NA
  result
}

safe_numeric <- function(x) {
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))
}

std_sex <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("male", "m", "1") ~ "Male",
    x_chr %in% c("female", "f", "2") ~ "Female",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

std_delivery_mode <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  case_when(
    # ★ v10.11 Fix #8: Updated delivery mode categories
    str_detect(x_chr, "vaginal|svd|normal|spontaneous") & !str_detect(x_chr, "cesar|caes|assisted|operative|vacuum|forcep|instrumental") ~ "Vaginal spontaneous",
    str_detect(x_chr, "cesar|caes|c-section|c_section|cs|lscs") ~ "Caesarean",
    str_detect(x_chr, "operative|instrumental|vacuum|forcep|assisted|ventouse") ~ "Vaginal assisted",
    str_detect(x_chr, "breech") ~ "Vaginal breech",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

# ★ v10.9: Standardized delivery location categories
# Categories: Hospital, Health center, Home, En route, Other, Unknown
std_delivery_location <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  case_when(
    # Hospital - any level
    str_detect(x_chr, "hospital|tertiary|regional|district") ~ "Hospital",
    # Health center / PHC / Clinic
    str_detect(x_chr, "phc|primary|health cent|clinic") & 
      !str_detect(x_chr, "private") ~ "Health center",
    # Private facility
    str_detect(x_chr, "private") ~ "Private facility",
    # Home delivery
    str_detect(x_chr, "^home$|home delivery|at home") ~ "Home",
    # En route / Born before arrival
    str_detect(x_chr, "en route|transit|on the way|bba|born before|another facility") ~ "En route/Other facility",
    # Direct admission (from ALERT referral - means came directly to facility)
    str_detect(x_chr, "direct admission") ~ "Hospital",
    # Referred (from ALERT - means transferred from elsewhere)
    str_detect(x_chr, "referred") ~ "Hospital",
    # Unknown / Don't know
    str_detect(x_chr, "unknown|don.*know") ~ NA_character_,
    # Other
    str_detect(x_chr, "other") ~ "Other",
    # If not matched, return original for review
    !is.na(x_chr) & x_chr != "" ~ x_chr,
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

convert_bw <- function(x) {
  bw <- safe_numeric(x)
  ifelse(!is.na(bw) & bw < 10, bw * 1000, bw)
}

# ============================================================================
# ★ v10.11 FIX #7: STANDARDIZE EDUCATION CATEGORIES
# Categories: None, Primary, Secondary, Higher
# ============================================================================
std_education <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  
  case_when(
    is.na(x) | x_chr == "" | x_chr == "na" ~ NA_character_,
    
    # None / No education (includes "unknown" per user request)
    str_detect(x_chr, "^no$|^none$|no educ|never|no school|not sure|don.*know|unknown") ~ "None",
    
    # Primary
    str_detect(x_chr, "primary|p[1-7]|grade\\s*[1-7]|elementary|incomplete primary|complete primary") ~ "Primary",
    
    # Secondary (includes O-level and A-level)
    str_detect(x_chr, "secondary|o.level|o'\\s*level|a.level|a'\\s*level|s[1-6]|high school|jss|sss") ~ "Secondary",
    
    # Higher education
    str_detect(x_chr, "tertiary|univ|college|degree|diploma|higher|post.?secondary|vocational") ~ "Higher",
    
    # Numeric years -> categorize
    TRUE ~ {
      yrs <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
      case_when(
        is.na(yrs) ~ NA_character_,
        yrs == 0 ~ "None",
        yrs >= 1 & yrs <= 6 ~ "Primary",
        yrs >= 7 & yrs <= 12 ~ "Secondary",
        yrs > 12 ~ "Higher",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    }
  )
}

# ============================================================================
# ★ v10.11 FIX #9: STANDARDIZE MARITAL STATUS CATEGORIES
# Categories: Married/Cohabiting, Single/Never married, Divorced/Separated, Widowed
# ============================================================================
std_marital_status <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  
  case_when(
    is.na(x) | x_chr == "" | x_chr == "na" ~ NA_character_,
    
    # Married/Cohabiting
    str_detect(x_chr, "married|cohabit|living with|living together|union") ~ "Married/Cohabiting",
    
    # Single/Never married
    str_detect(x_chr, "single|never married|never been married|unmarried") ~ "Single/Never married",
    
    # Divorced/Separated
    str_detect(x_chr, "divorced|separated|divorce|separat") ~ "Divorced/Separated",
    
    # Widowed
    str_detect(x_chr, "widow") ~ "Widowed",
    
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

# ============================================================================
# ★ v10.11 FIX #15: HYPERTENSION STAGING
# Categories: Normal, Stage 1 Hypertension, Stage 2 Hypertension
# ============================================================================
std_hypertension_stage <- function(sbp, dbp, has_hypertension = NULL) {
  case_when(
    is.na(sbp) & is.na(dbp) & (is.null(has_hypertension) | is.na(has_hypertension)) ~ NA_character_,
    
    # Stage 2: SBP ≥160 or DBP ≥100
    (!is.na(sbp) & sbp >= 160) | (!is.na(dbp) & dbp >= 100) ~ "Stage 2 Hypertension",
    
    # Stage 1: SBP 140-159 or DBP 90-99
    (!is.na(sbp) & sbp >= 140) | (!is.na(dbp) & dbp >= 90) ~ "Stage 1 Hypertension",
    
    # If has_hypertension flag but BP values don't indicate staging
    !is.null(has_hypertension) & has_hypertension == "Yes" ~ "Hypertension (stage unknown)",
    
    # Normal
    (!is.na(sbp) & sbp < 140) & (!is.na(dbp) & dbp < 90) ~ "Normal",
    
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}
```

## 0.3 Schema Definition

```{r phase0-schema}
# ============================================================================
# COMPLETE VARIABLE SCHEMA
# ★ v10.11: Added new variables for SGA classification, hypertension staging, etc.
# ★ v10.12: Added study_design, module, sample_weight for stratified analysis & DHS integration
# ★ v10.13: Added out_ga_method; fixed NCOPS module to Prospective neonatal cohort; fixed PTBi module to Facility birth registry
# ★ v10.15: CRITICAL FIX - ALERT out_dob now uses q23birth (actual birth date) instead of
#           q9dob (EDD); added parse_stata_datetime() for CSV epoch handling; added fallback
#           out_ageatdeath/out_dod computation in derive_outcomes(); DHS b6=200 early/late NND
#           classification returns NA instead of incorrect "No"
# ============================================================================
SCHEMA <- list(
  identifiers = c("unified_id", "study_source", "study_design", "module", "sample_weight", "out_ga_method",
                   "raw_id", "raw_id_secondary"),
  
  outcomes = c(
    "out_stillbirth", "out_stillbirth_20wks", "out_stillbirth_28wks",
    "out_fresh_stillbirth", "out_macerated_stillbirth",
    "out_livebirth", "out_nnd", "out_nnd_early", "out_nnd_late",
    "out_perinatal_death", "out_ga_weeks", "out_ga_days",
    "out_birthweight_g", "out_birthweight_centile", "out_birthweight_zscore",
    "out_infant_sex", "out_apgar_1min", "out_apgar_5min", "out_apgar_10min",
    "out_sga", "out_lga", "out_aga", "out_sizeforGA",  # ★ v10.11: Added out_aga and out_sizeforGA
    "out_lbw", "out_vlbw", "out_elbw",
    "out_preterm", "out_very_preterm", "out_extremely_preterm",
    "out_dod", "out_dob_source", "out_ageatdeath", "out_multiple"  # ★ v10.11: Added out_dob_source
  ),
  
  maternal = c(
    "mat_age", "mat_marital_status", "mat_religion", "mat_education",
    "mat_literacy", "mat_occupation", "mat_ethnicity",
    "mat_country", "mat_facility", "mat_district", "mat_urban_rural",
    "mat_gravidity", "mat_parity", "mat_previous_cs", "mat_previous_stillbirth", "mat_previous_csection",  # ★ v10.11: Added mat_previous_csection
    "mat_anc_visits", "mat_anc_provider", "mat_hiv_status", "mat_syphilis",
    "mat_height", "mat_weight", "mat_bmi", "mat_muac",
    "mat_sbp", "mat_dbp", "mat_hypertension", "mat_hypertension_stage",  # ★ v10.11: Added mat_hypertension_stage
    "mat_preeclampsia", "mat_eclampsia", "mat_aph",  # ★ v10.11: Added mat_eclampsia and mat_aph
    "mat_diabetes", "mat_malaria", "mat_anaemia",  # ★ v10.11: Added mat_diabetes, mat_malaria, mat_anaemia
    "mat_delivery_mode", "mat_csection",  # ★ v10.11: Added mat_csection
    "mat_delivery_location", "mat_birth_attendant",
    "mat_prolonged_labour", "mat_obstructed_labour", "mat_prom"
  ),
  
  household = c(
    "hh_ppi_score", "hh_ppi_band", "hh_poverty_likelihood",
    "hh_wealth_quintile", "hh_ses_binary",
    "hh_wall_material", "hh_floor_material", "hh_ownership", "hh_num_rooms",
    "hh_cooking_fuel", "hh_heating_fuel", "hh_lighting",
    "hh_electricity", "hh_water_source", "hh_sanitation", "hh_hygiene",
    "hh_mosquito_net", "hh_size", "hh_monthly_income"
  ),
  
  location = c(
    "loc_country", "loc_region", "loc_district", "loc_facility",
    "loc_village", "loc_latitude", "loc_longitude",
    "loc_urban_rural", "loc_facility_type"
  ),
  
  temporal = c("study_date", "studyyear", "out_dob", "yob", "delivery_date_raw", 
               "conception_date", "conception_date_source")  # ★ v10.11: Added conception_date_source
)

ALL_SCHEMA_VARS <- unlist(SCHEMA, use.names = FALSE)

# Derived outcomes function
# ★ v10.11 Fix #6: Improved early/late NND logic with proper mutual exclusivity
derive_outcomes <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      ## ★ v10.15 Fix: Fallback computations for ageatdeath and DOD
      ## These catch any study where one is available but the other wasn't set
      
      # Compute out_ageatdeath from DOD - DOB if still missing
      out_ageatdeath = {
        days_calc <- as.numeric(difftime(out_dod, out_dob, units = "days"))
        days_valid <- ifelse(!is.na(days_calc) & days_calc >= 0 & days_calc <= 28, 
                             days_calc, NA_real_)
        case_when(
          !is.na(out_ageatdeath) ~ out_ageatdeath,  # keep existing
          out_stillbirth == "Yes" ~ 0,                # stillbirths = 0
          out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(out_dod) & !is.na(out_dob) ~ days_valid,
          TRUE ~ out_ageatdeath
        )
      },
      
      # Compute out_dod from DOB + ageatdeath if still missing
      out_dod = case_when(
        !is.na(out_dod) ~ out_dod,  # keep existing
        out_stillbirth == "Yes" & !is.na(out_dob) ~ out_dob,  # stillbirth DOD = DOB
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(out_dob) & !is.na(out_ageatdeath) & out_ageatdeath >= 0 ~
          out_dob + as.integer(out_ageatdeath),
        TRUE ~ out_dod
      ),
      
      out_lbw = case_when(
        out_birthweight_g < 2500 ~ "Yes",
        out_birthweight_g >= 2500 ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      out_vlbw = case_when(
        out_birthweight_g < 1500 ~ "Yes",
        out_birthweight_g >= 1500 ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      out_elbw = case_when(
        out_birthweight_g < 1000 ~ "Yes",
        out_birthweight_g >= 1000 ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      out_preterm = case_when(
        out_ga_weeks < 37 ~ "Yes",
        out_ga_weeks >= 37 ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      out_very_preterm = case_when(
        out_ga_weeks < 32 ~ "Yes",
        out_ga_weeks >= 32 ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      out_extremely_preterm = case_when(
        out_ga_weeks < 28 ~ "Yes",
        out_ga_weeks >= 28 ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      out_perinatal_death = case_when(
        out_stillbirth == "Yes" | out_nnd == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
        out_stillbirth == "No" & (out_nnd == "No" | is.na(out_nnd)) ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      # ★ v10.11 Fix #6: FIXED Early NND logic
      # Must be a live birth AND NND AND age at death 0-7 days
      out_nnd_early = case_when(
        out_livebirth != "Yes" ~ NA_character_,
        out_nnd == "No" ~ "No",  # NOT an NND = not early NND
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(out_ageatdeath) & out_ageatdeath >= 0 & out_ageatdeath <= 7 ~ "Yes",
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(out_ageatdeath) & out_ageatdeath > 7 ~ "No",  # FIXED: Late NND gets "No" for early
        out_nnd == "Yes" & is.na(out_ageatdeath) ~ NA_character_,
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      # ★ v10.11 Fix #6: FIXED Late NND logic
      # Must be a live birth AND NND AND age at death 8-28 days
      out_nnd_late = case_when(
        out_livebirth != "Yes" ~ NA_character_,
        out_nnd == "No" ~ "No",  # NOT an NND = not late NND
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(out_ageatdeath) & out_ageatdeath > 7 & out_ageatdeath <= 28 ~ "Yes",
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(out_ageatdeath) & out_ageatdeath <= 7 ~ "No",  # FIXED: Early NND gets "No" for late
        out_nnd == "Yes" & is.na(out_ageatdeath) ~ NA_character_,
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      # ★ v10.9: Compute stillbirth thresholds from GA
      # Stillbirth at 28+ weeks (WHO definition for international comparison)
      out_stillbirth_28wks = case_when(
        out_stillbirth != "Yes" ~ NA_character_,
        !is.na(out_ga_weeks) & out_ga_weeks >= 28 ~ "Yes",
        !is.na(out_ga_weeks) & out_ga_weeks < 28 ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      # Stillbirth at 20+ weeks (US/clinical definition)
      out_stillbirth_20wks = case_when(
        out_stillbirth != "Yes" ~ NA_character_,
        !is.na(out_ga_weeks) & out_ga_weeks >= 20 ~ "Yes",
        !is.na(out_ga_weeks) & out_ga_weeks < 20 ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
}

# Ensure complete schema
ensure_complete_schema <- function(df) {
  missing_vars <- setdiff(ALL_SCHEMA_VARS, names(df))
  for (v in missing_vars) {
    df[[v]] <- NA
  }
  df %>% select(any_of(ALL_SCHEMA_VARS), everything())
}
```

# Phase 1: Load Raw Data

```{r phase1-load}
cat("\n")
cat("╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗\n")
cat("║                     PHASE 1: LOADING RAW DATA                              ║\n")
cat("╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\n\n")

raw_ncops     <- safe_load_data(FILE_NCOPS)
raw_alert     <- safe_load_data(FILE_ALERT)
raw_precise   <- safe_load_data(FILE_PRECISE)
raw_ptbi      <- safe_load_data(FILE_PTBI)
raw_enindepth <- safe_load_data(FILE_ENINDEPTH)
raw_whomcs    <- safe_load_data(FILE_WHOMCS)

# ============================================================================
# LOAD AND MERGE SES / WEALTH QUINTILE FILES
# ============================================================================

# --- NCOPS SES ---
raw_ncops_ses <- safe_load_data(FILE_NCOPS_SES)
if (!is.null(raw_ncops_ses) && !is.null(raw_ncops) && "unique_id" %in% names(raw_ncops_ses)) {
  # Ensure join key exists in both
  if ("unique_id" %in% names(raw_ncops)) {
    n_before <- nrow(raw_ncops)
    raw_ncops <- raw_ncops %>%
      left_join(raw_ncops_ses %>% select(unique_id, any_of(c("asset_index", "quintile"))),
                by = "unique_id")
    cat(sprintf("✓ Merged NCOPS SES: %d/%d matched\n",
                sum(!is.na(raw_ncops$quintile)), n_before))
  }
}

# --- PRECISE SES ---
raw_precise_ses <- safe_load_data(FILE_PRECISE_SES)
if (!is.null(raw_precise_ses) && !is.null(raw_precise) && "f2a_participant_id" %in% names(raw_precise_ses)) {
  # Handle haven_labelled in .dta SES file
  if ("wealth_quintile" %in% names(raw_precise_ses)) {
    raw_precise_ses <- raw_precise_ses %>%
      mutate(wealth_quintile = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(
        if (inherits(wealth_quintile, "haven_labelled")) haven::as_factor(wealth_quintile) else wealth_quintile
      ))))
  }
  if ("f2a_participant_id" %in% names(raw_precise)) {
    n_before <- nrow(raw_precise)
    raw_precise <- raw_precise %>%
      left_join(raw_precise_ses %>% select(f2a_participant_id, any_of(c("wealth_quintile"))),
                by = "f2a_participant_id")
    cat(sprintf("✓ Merged PRECISE SES: %d/%d matched\n",
                sum(!is.na(raw_precise$wealth_quintile)), n_before))
  }
}
```

# Phase 2: Harmonization Functions

## 2.1 NCOPS Harmonization

```{r phase2-ncops}
harmonize_ncops <- function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(tibble() %>% ensure_complete_schema())
  
  n <- nrow(df)
  
  # ============================================================================
  # HELPER: Decode NCOPS variables that may be numeric-coded OR string-labelled
  # ============================================================================
  # When imported from .dta via haven, variables may be haven_labelled (numeric

  # with value labels). When imported from CSV, they may already be strings.
  # This helper handles both formats by checking if each value is a known
  # numeric code and mapping it to the appropriate label.
  
  decode_var <- function(x, label_map) {
    if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) return(rep(NA_character_, n))
    
    # If haven_labelled, decode first
    if (inherits(x, "haven_labelled")) {
      x <- haven::as_factor(x, levels = "labels")
    }
    
    x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
    x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
    result <- x_chr
    
    # Map numeric codes to their labels
    for (code in names(label_map)) {
      lbl <- label_map[[code]]
      # Match by numeric code (handles both numeric and character "1", "2", etc.)
      idx <- !is.na(x_num) & x_num == as.numeric(code)
      result[idx] <- lbl
    }
    
    # Clean up: blank strings and literal "NA" become true NA
    result[is.na(x) | result == "" | result == "NA" | result == "nan"] <- NA_character_
    return(result)
  }
  
  # ============================================================================
  # HELPER: Safe numeric extraction (handles string, numeric, haven_labelled)
  # ============================================================================
  safe_num <- function(col_name) {
    if (!col_name %in% names(df)) return(rep(NA_real_, n))
    x <- df[[col_name]]
    if (inherits(x, "haven_labelled")) x <- as.numeric(x)
    return(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x))))
  }
  
  # ============================================================================
  # HELPER: Safe character extraction with multiple column fallback
  # Returns the first column found that has data; prefers columns with more data
  # ============================================================================
  safe_chr <- function(...) {
    col_names <- c(...)
    for (col_name in col_names) {
      if (col_name %in% names(df)) {
        x <- df[[col_name]]
        if (inherits(x, "haven_labelled")) x <- haven::as_factor(x, levels = "labels")
        x <- trimws(as.character(x))
        x[x == "" | x == "NA" | x == "nan"] <- NA_character_
        if (sum(!is.na(x)) > 0) return(x)
      }
    }
    return(rep(NA_character_, n))
  }
  
  # ============================================================================
  # NCOPS VALUE LABEL DEFINITIONS (from NCOPS Stata do-file)
  # ============================================================================
  # These map numeric codes (used in .dta) to their string labels
  
  lbl_yesno <- c("1" = "Yes", "2" = "No")
  lbl_yesno_unk <- c("1" = "Yes", "2" = "No", "3" = "Unknown")
  
  lbl_status <- c(
    "1" = "Alive with no disabilities", "2" = "Dead",
    "3" = "Lost to follow-up",          "4" = "Alive with disabilities"
    # Note: "Referred" also appears in some data exports
  )
  
  lbl_gender <- c("1" = "Male", "2" = "Female")
  
  lbl_marital_rel <- c("1" = "Married", "2" = "Single")
  
  lbl_marital_det <- c(
    "1" = "Married living with the husband",
    "2" = "Married living away from my husband",
    "3" = "Never Married", "4" = "Widow", "5" = "Divorced/Seperated"
  )
  
  lbl_district <- c(
    "1" = "Jinja", "2" = "Iganga", "3" = "Buikwe",
    "4" = "Mayuge", "5" = "Others", "6" = "Unknown"
  )
  
  lbl_religion <- c(
    "1" = "Catholic", "2" = "Anglican", "3" = "Moslem",
    "4" = "Born Again", "5" = "Others"
  )
  
  lbl_religioo <- c(
    "1" = "Catholic", "2" = "Protestant", "3" = "Muslim",
    "4" = "Pentecostal", "5" = "SDA", "6" = "Others"
  )
  
  lbl_education <- c(
    "1" = "Primary incomplete",     "2" = "'O' Level incomplete",
    "3" = "'A' Level incomplete",   "4" = "Primary complete",
    "5" = "'O' level complete",     "6" = "'A' level complete",
    "7" = "University/Tertiary",    "8" = "Not sure/Don't know"
  )
  
  lbl_occupation <- c(
    "1" = "Not employed/house wife", "2" = "Farmer",
    "3" = "Small scale business",    "4" = "Business",
    "5" = "Salaried worker",         "6" = "Labourer"
  )
  
  lbl_delivery <- c("1" = "Normal SVD", "2" = "Caesarean", "3" = "Vacuum")
  
  lbl_birth_loc <- c(
    "1" = "Hospital",   "2" = "Home", "3" = "Another Facility",
    "4" = "On the way to hospital", "5" = "Unknown"
  )
  
  lbl_attendant <- c(
    "1" = "Doctor", "2" = "TBA", "3" = "Midwife/Nurse",
    "4" = "Family Member", "5" = "Other", "6" = "Unknown"
  )
  
  lbl_hiv_result <- c("1" = "TR", "2" = "TRR")
  
  lbl_vdrl_result <- c("1" = "Reactive", "2" = "Non-Reactive")
  
  lbl_referral <- c(
    "1" = "Self referral", "2" = "Health Centre", "3" = "Hospital",
    "4" = "Private Clinic", "5" = "Private Hospital/NGO/PNFP/Mission"
  )
  
  lbl_walls <- c("1" = "Mud/Wattle", "2" = "Metal", "3" = "Bricks", "4" = "Wood")
  
  lbl_floor <- c("1" = "Earth/Mud", "2" = "Concrete", "3" = "Bricks/Tiles")
  
  lbl_ownership <- c("1" = "Rent", "2" = "Own")
  
  lbl_fuel <- c(
    "1" = "Firewood/charcl/dung", "2" = "Paraffin", "3" = "Electricity/Gas"
  )
  
  lbl_water <- c(
    "1" = "More than 30 minutes walk from house",
    "2" = "Less than 30 mins walk",
    "3" = "Tap inside household"
  )
  
  lbl_toilet <- c(
    "1" = "No Toilet",
    "2" = "toilet shared with other households",
    "3" = "Toilet in household"
  )
  
  lbl_multiple <- c(
    "1" = "Singleton", "2" = "Twin", "3" = "Triplet", "4" = "Quad"
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # PRE-DECODE ALL KEY VARIABLES
  # ============================================================================
  # This step ensures variables are usable strings regardless of input format
  
  # -- Section 1: Outcomes --
  status_decoded <- decode_var(safe_chr("status_of_baby_at_dischargf"), lbl_status)
  status_lower   <- tolower(status_decoded)
  gender_decoded  <- decode_var(safe_chr("gender"), lbl_gender)
  delivery_decoded <- decode_var(safe_chr("mode_of_delivery"), lbl_delivery)
  birth_loc_decoded <- decode_var(safe_chr("birth_location"), lbl_birth_loc)
  attendant_decoded <- decode_var(safe_chr("birth_attendant"), lbl_attendant)
  
  # Multiple pregnancy (may not exist in all exports)
  multiple_decoded <- if ("multiple_pregnancy" %in% names(df)) {
    decode_var(safe_chr("multiple_pregnancy"), lbl_multiple)
  } else {
    rep(NA_character_, n)
  }
  
  # -- Section 2: Maternal Demographics --
  # Marital status: prefer detailed (socdem) with fallback to simple (demographics)
  marital_detailed <- decode_var(safe_chr("marital_status"), lbl_marital_det)
  marital_simple   <- decode_var(safe_chr("marital_status_relationship"), lbl_marital_rel)
  marital_combined <- ifelse(!is.na(marital_detailed), marital_detailed,
                             ifelse(!is.na(marital_simple), marital_simple, NA_character_))
  
  # Religion: prefer religioo (socdem, 532/536) with fallback to religion (521/536)
  religion_socdem <- decode_var(safe_chr("religioo"), lbl_religioo)
  religion_demo   <- decode_var(safe_chr("religion"), lbl_religion)
  religion_combined <- ifelse(!is.na(religion_socdem), religion_socdem,
                              ifelse(!is.na(religion_demo), religion_demo, NA_character_))
  
  # Education: combine school attendance + level achieved
  school_attended <- decode_var(safe_chr("have_you_ever_attended_school"), lbl_yesno)
  education_level <- decode_var(safe_chr("if_yes_what_is_the_highest_leve"), lbl_education)
  education_combined <- case_when(
    !is.na(education_level) & education_level != "Not sure/Don't know" ~ education_level,
    !is.na(school_attended) & school_attended == "No" ~ "None",
    !is.na(education_level) & education_level == "Not sure/Don't know" ~ "Not sure/Don't know",
    !is.na(school_attended) & school_attended == "Yes" ~ "Unknown level",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # Occupation
  occupation_decoded <- decode_var(safe_chr("what_is_your_primary_occupation"), lbl_occupation)
  
  # District
  district_decoded <- decode_var(safe_chr("mother_s_district_of_residence"), lbl_district)
  
  # HIV: combine testing status with result
  # IF_YES_RESULT: TR = Test Reactive (positive), TRR = Test Result non-Reactive (negative)
  hiv_tested <- decode_var(safe_chr("mother_tested_for_hiv"), lbl_yesno)
  hiv_result <- decode_var(safe_chr("if_yes_result"), lbl_hiv_result)
  hiv_combined <- case_when(
    !is.na(hiv_result) & hiv_result == "TR"  ~ "Positive",
    !is.na(hiv_result) & hiv_result == "TRR" ~ "Negative",
    !is.na(hiv_tested) & hiv_tested == "No"  ~ "Not tested",
    !is.na(hiv_tested) & hiv_tested == "Yes" ~ "Tested, result unknown",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # Syphilis (VDRL/TPHA): combine testing with result
  vdrl_tested <- decode_var(safe_chr("vdrl_tpha_during_pregnancy"), lbl_yesno)
  vdrl_result <- decode_var(safe_chr("if_yes"), lbl_vdrl_result)
  syphilis_combined <- case_when(
    !is.na(vdrl_result) & vdrl_result == "Reactive"     ~ "Positive",
    !is.na(vdrl_result) & vdrl_result == "Non-Reactive"  ~ "Negative",
    !is.na(vdrl_tested) & vdrl_tested == "No"             ~ "Not tested",
    !is.na(vdrl_tested) & vdrl_tested == "Yes"            ~ "Tested, result unknown",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # Pregnancy complication Yes/No variables
  hypertension_decoded  <- decode_var(safe_chr("hypertension"), lbl_yesno)
  preeclampsia_decoded  <- decode_var(safe_chr("high_blood_pressure_elampsia"), lbl_yesno)
  prolonged_decoded     <- decode_var(safe_chr("prolonged_labour"), lbl_yesno)
  obstructed_decoded    <- decode_var(safe_chr("obstructed_labour"), lbl_yesno)
  prom_decoded          <- decode_var(safe_chr("pre_labor_rupture_of_membranes"), lbl_yesno)
  
  # ANC attendance
  anc_decoded <- decode_var(safe_chr("anc_attendance"), lbl_yesno)
  
  # -- Section 3: Household/SES --
  walls_decoded       <- decode_var(safe_chr("what_are_your_house_walls_made_o"), lbl_walls)
  floor_decoded       <- decode_var(safe_chr("what_is_your_house_floor_made_of"), lbl_floor)
  ownership_decoded   <- decode_var(safe_chr("do_you_own_or_rent_your_house"), lbl_ownership)
  fuel_decoded        <- decode_var(safe_chr("what_is_the_primary_fuel_used_fo"), lbl_fuel)
  electricity_decoded <- decode_var(safe_chr("do_you_have_electricity_at_home"), lbl_yesno)
  water_decoded       <- decode_var(safe_chr("where_do_you_get_your_clean_drin"), lbl_water)
  toilet_decoded      <- decode_var(safe_chr("what_toilet_facilities_do_you_ha"), lbl_toilet)
  mosquito_decoded    <- decode_var(safe_chr("do_you_sleep_under_mosquito_net"), lbl_yesno)
  
  # ============================================================================
  # ID
  # ============================================================================
  id_raw <- safe_chr("unique_id")
  
  # ============================================================================
  # BUILD UNIFIED TIBBLE
  # ============================================================================
  result <- tibble(
    unified_id       = paste0("NCOPS_", seq_len(n)),
    study_source     = "NCOPS",
    study_design     = "Facility-based",
    module           = "Prospective neonatal cohort",
    sample_weight    = NA_real_,
    raw_id           = ifelse(!is.na(id_raw), id_raw, paste0("ncops_", seq_len(n))),
    raw_id_secondary = NA_character_,
    
    # -- Dates --
    study_date       = parse_date_multi(safe_chr("date_of_examination")),
    studyyear        = as.integer(year(parse_date_multi(
                         safe_chr("date_of_examination", "date_of_birth")))),
    out_dob          = parse_date_multi(safe_chr("date_of_birth")),
    yob              = as.integer(year(parse_date_multi(safe_chr("date_of_birth")))),
    delivery_date_raw = parse_date_multi(safe_chr("date_of_birth")),
    conception_date  = as.Date(NA),
    
    # ==========================================================================
    # SECTION 1: PRIMARY OUTCOME VARIABLES
    # ==========================================================================
    # CRITICAL: NCOPS recruited ONLY live births into the study.
    # There are NO stillbirths in this dataset by design.
    # The status_of_baby_at_dischargf variable captures DISCHARGE status
    # (after admission as a live neonate), not birth status.
    # "Dead" at discharge = neonatal death (baby was born alive, died later).
    
    out_stillbirth   = "No",
    out_livebirth    = "Yes",
    
    out_nnd = case_when(
      status_lower %in% "dead" ~ "Yes",
      status_lower %in% c("alive with no disabilities",
                           "alive with disabilities",
                           "lost to follow-up",
                           "referred") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    out_fresh_stillbirth     = "No",
    out_macerated_stillbirth = "No",
    out_stillbirth_20wks     = "No",
    out_stillbirth_28wks     = "No",
    
    # GA: ballard_score IS the gestational age in weeks from Ballard assessment
    out_ga_weeks         = safe_num("ballard_score"),
    out_ga_days          = safe_num("ballard_score") * 7,
    out_ga_method        = "Ballard score",
    out_birthweight_g    = convert_bw(get_col(df, "birth_weight_kg")),
    out_birthweight_centile = NA_real_,
    out_birthweight_zscore  = NA_real_,
    out_infant_sex       = std_sex(gender_decoded),
    out_apgar_1min       = safe_num("apgar_at_1min"),
    out_apgar_5min       = safe_num("apgar_at_5min"),
    out_apgar_10min      = NA_real_,
    out_sga              = NA_character_,
    out_lga              = NA_character_,
    out_dod              = parse_date_multi(safe_chr("if_death_date_of_deati")),
    out_ageatdeath       = NA_real_,
    out_multiple = case_when(
      !is.na(multiple_decoded) & multiple_decoded == "Singleton" ~ "No",
      !is.na(multiple_decoded) & multiple_decoded %in% c("Twin", "Triplet", "Quad") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # ==========================================================================
    # SECTION 2: MATERNAL DEMOGRAPHICS
    # ==========================================================================
    
    mat_age             = safe_num("mother_s_age"),
    mat_marital_status  = marital_combined,
    mat_religion        = religion_combined,
    mat_education       = education_combined,
    mat_literacy        = NA_character_,
    mat_occupation      = occupation_decoded,
    mat_ethnicity       = NA_character_,
    mat_country         = "Uganda",
    mat_facility        = safe_chr("facility_name"),
    mat_district        = district_decoded,
    mat_urban_rural     = NA_character_,
    
    # Gravidity = number_of_pregnacies (per mapping document)
    mat_gravidity       = safe_num("number_of_pregnacies"),
    
    # Parity = number_of_live_children (per mapping document:
    # "NCOPS: Derived: number_of_live_children")
    mat_parity          = safe_num("number_of_live_children"),
    
    mat_previous_cs     = NA_real_,
    mat_previous_stillbirth = NA_character_,
    mat_anc_visits      = safe_num("number_of_anc_visits"),
    mat_anc_provider    = NA_character_,
    mat_hiv_status      = hiv_combined,
    mat_syphilis        = syphilis_combined,
    mat_height          = NA_real_,
    mat_weight          = NA_real_,
    mat_bmi             = NA_real_,
    mat_muac            = NA_real_,
    mat_sbp             = safe_num("sbp"),
    mat_dbp             = safe_num("dbp"),
    mat_hypertension    = hypertension_decoded,
    mat_preeclampsia    = preeclampsia_decoded,
    mat_delivery_mode   = std_delivery_mode(delivery_decoded),
    mat_delivery_location = birth_loc_decoded,
    mat_birth_attendant = attendant_decoded,
    mat_prolonged_labour  = prolonged_decoded,
    mat_obstructed_labour = obstructed_decoded,
    mat_prom            = prom_decoded,
    
    # ==========================================================================
    # SECTION 3: HOUSEHOLD SOCIOECONOMIC INDICATORS
    # ==========================================================================
    
    hh_ppi_score        = NA_real_,
    hh_ppi_band         = NA_character_,
    hh_poverty_likelihood = NA_real_,
    # hh_wealth_quintile: from merged ses_ncops file (quintile column)
    # NCOPS quintile is string: "Poorest","Poor","Middle class","Wealthy","Wealthiest"
    # Standardise to: 1=Poorest, 2=Poor, 3=Middle class, 4=Wealthy, 5=Wealthiest
    hh_wealth_quintile  = {
      q_raw <- safe_chr("quintile")
      q_lower <- tolower(trimws(q_raw))
      case_when(
        q_lower == "poorest"      ~ "1 - Poorest",
        q_lower == "poor"         ~ "2 - Poor",
        q_lower == "middle class" ~ "3 - Middle class",
        q_lower == "wealthy"      ~ "4 - Wealthy",
        q_lower == "wealthiest"   ~ "5 - Wealthiest",
        # Numeric fallback (if loaded from .dta with numeric codes)
        suppressWarnings(as.numeric(q_raw)) == 1 ~ "1 - Poorest",
        suppressWarnings(as.numeric(q_raw)) == 2 ~ "2 - Poor",
        suppressWarnings(as.numeric(q_raw)) == 3 ~ "3 - Middle class",
        suppressWarnings(as.numeric(q_raw)) == 4 ~ "4 - Wealthy",
        suppressWarnings(as.numeric(q_raw)) == 5 ~ "5 - Wealthiest",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    },
    hh_ses_binary       = NA_character_,
    hh_wall_material    = walls_decoded,
    hh_floor_material   = floor_decoded,
    hh_ownership        = ownership_decoded,
    hh_num_rooms        = safe_num("how_many_rooms_in_your_house_i"),
    hh_cooking_fuel     = fuel_decoded,
    hh_heating_fuel     = NA_character_,
    hh_lighting         = NA_character_,
    hh_electricity      = electricity_decoded,
    hh_water_source     = water_decoded,
    hh_sanitation       = toilet_decoded,
    hh_hygiene          = NA_character_,
    hh_mosquito_net     = mosquito_decoded,
    hh_size             = safe_num("how_many_people_including_yours"),
    hh_monthly_income   = safe_num("what_is_your_personnal_monthly_i"),
    
    # ==========================================================================
    # LOCATION
    # ==========================================================================
    loc_country       = "Uganda",
    loc_region        = NA_character_,
    loc_district      = district_decoded,
    loc_facility      = safe_chr("facility_name"),
    loc_village       = safe_chr("village"),
    loc_latitude      = NA_real_,
    loc_longitude     = NA_real_,
    loc_urban_rural   = NA_character_,
    loc_facility_type = NA_character_
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # POST-PROCESSING: Derive age at death from dates
  # ============================================================================
  result <- result %>%
    mutate(
      out_ageatdeath = ifelse(
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(out_dod) & !is.na(out_dob),
        as.numeric(difftime(out_dod, out_dob, units = "days")),
        NA_real_
      ),
      # Safety: age at death must be non-negative and plausible (0-28 days for NND)
      out_ageatdeath = ifelse(
        !is.na(out_ageatdeath) & out_ageatdeath >= 0 & out_ageatdeath <= 28,
        out_ageatdeath, NA_real_
      ),
      # Fallback study year from DOB if examination date missing
      studyyear = ifelse(is.na(studyyear) & !is.na(yob), yob, studyyear),
      
      # Compute mat_age_cat from mat_age
      mat_age_cat = case_when(
        is.na(mat_age) ~ NA_character_,
        mat_age < 20 ~ "<20",
        mat_age >= 20 & mat_age < 25 ~ "20-24",
        mat_age >= 25 & mat_age < 30 ~ "25-29",
        mat_age >= 30 & mat_age < 35 ~ "30-34",
        mat_age >= 35 ~ "35+",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
  
  result %>% derive_outcomes() %>% ensure_complete_schema()
}
```

## 2.2 ALERT Harmonization
##
## UPDATED: Robust haven_labelled handling for .dta imports
## - Added safe_num / safe_lbl / match_any helpers for dual numeric+string matching
## - Multi-source country derivation (country → count → hosp → hospn first digit)
## - Fixed duplicate out_nnd, fixed regex patterns that failed on bare numeric codes
## - Added delivery mode from q24mode, multiple birth from q25babies
## - Added gest_age (days) as fallback GA source
## - Corrected apgar mapping: q30apg → out_apgar_1min (per ALERT CRF)

```{r phase2-alert}
harmonize_alert <- function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(tibble() %>% ensure_complete_schema())
  
  n <- nrow(df)
  
  # ============================================================================
  # HAVEN-AWARE HELPERS
  # Handle both haven_labelled (.dta numeric codes) and plain strings (CSV)
  # ============================================================================
  
  # Get underlying numeric value - strips haven labels, keeps number
  safe_num <- function(x) {
    if (is.null(x)) return(rep(NA_real_, n))
    if (inherits(x, "haven_labelled")) return(as.numeric(unclass(x)))
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  }
  
  # Get label text for haven_labelled, or lowercase string as-is
  safe_lbl <- function(x) {
    if (is.null(x)) return(rep(NA_character_, n))
    if (inherits(x, "haven_labelled")) {
      tryCatch(tolower(as.character(haven::as_factor(x))),
               error = function(e) tolower(as.character(x)))
    } else {
      tolower(as.character(x))
    }
  }
  
  # Dual match: TRUE if numeric value is in nums OR label text matches regex pattern
  match_any <- function(x, nums = NULL, patterns = NULL) {
    x_num <- safe_num(x)
    x_lbl <- safe_lbl(x)
    hit <- rep(FALSE, length(x_num))
    if (!is.null(nums)) {
      hit <- hit | (x_num %in% nums & !is.na(x_num))
    }
    if (!is.null(patterns)) {
      for (p in patterns) {
        m <- str_detect(x_lbl, regex(p, ignore_case = TRUE))
        m[is.na(m)] <- FALSE
        hit <- hit | m
      }
    }
    hit
  }
  
  # ============================================================================
  # SECTION 1: PRIMARY OUTCOME VARIABLES
  # ============================================================================
  
  # --- Birth outcome: q27out (1=Alive, 2=Fresh stillbirth, 3=Macerated stillbirth) ---
  q27 <- get_col(df, "q27out")
  is_alive     <- match_any(q27, nums = 1, patterns = c("alive"))
  is_fresh_sb  <- match_any(q27, nums = 2, patterns = c("fresh"))
  is_mac_sb    <- match_any(q27, nums = 3, patterns = c("macer"))
  is_stillbirth <- is_fresh_sb | is_mac_sb
  has_outcome  <- is_alive | is_stillbirth
  
  # --- Neonatal death ---
  # Primary: neonataldeath (binary 0/1)
  nnd_val <- safe_num(get_col(df, "neonataldeath"))
  
  # Fallback: q44status (1=Alive, 2=Dead, 3=Died within 24h)
  q44 <- get_col(df, "q44status")
  is_dead_q44 <- match_any(q44, nums = c(2, 3), patterns = c("dead|died"))
  is_alive_q44 <- match_any(q44, nums = 1, patterns = c("alive"))
  
  # Fallback: q45status (1=Alive, 3=Died within 24h, 4=Died after 24h)
  q45 <- get_col(df, "q45status")
  is_dead_q45 <- match_any(q45, nums = c(3, 4), patterns = c("died|dead"))
  is_alive_q45 <- match_any(q45, nums = 1, patterns = c("alive"))
  
  out_nnd_final <- case_when(
    !is_alive ~ NA_character_,  # NND only applies to live births
    nnd_val == 1 | is_dead_q44 | is_dead_q45 ~ "Yes",
    nnd_val == 0 | is_alive_q44 | is_alive_q45 ~ "No",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # --- Infant sex: q29sex (1=Male, 2=Female) ---
  # NOTE: ALERT q29sex may contain garbage values (e.g., "10", "9", "8", "Yes", "No")
  # Only accept valid sex values - numeric codes 1/2 OR exact string matches
  sex_raw <- get_col(df, "q29sex")
  sex_lbl <- safe_lbl(sex_raw)
  sex_num_val <- safe_num(sex_raw)
  
  infant_sex <- case_when(
    # Numeric code matching (most reliable for .dta files)
    sex_num_val == 1 ~ "Male",
    sex_num_val == 2 ~ "Female",
    # Exact string matching for decoded labels (NOT partial matching)
    sex_lbl %in% c("male", "m", "1. male") ~ "Male",
    sex_lbl %in% c("female", "f", "2. female") ~ "Female",
    # Do NOT map other values - they are data entry errors
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # --- Gestational age ---
  # Primary: q9aga (weeks)
  ga_wks <- safe_num(get_col(df, "q9aga"))
  ga_wks <- ifelse(!is.na(ga_wks) & ga_wks >= 20 & ga_wks <= 45, ga_wks, NA_real_)
  
  # Fallback: gest_age (days) → convert to weeks
  ga_days_raw <- safe_num(get_col(df, "gest_age"))
  ga_from_days <- ifelse(!is.na(ga_days_raw) & ga_days_raw >= 140 & ga_days_raw <= 315,
                         floor(ga_days_raw / 7), NA_real_)
  ga_wks <- coalesce(ga_wks, ga_from_days)
  
  # --- Birth weight ---
  # Primary: q28weight (grams)
  bw_raw <- safe_num(get_col(df, "q28weight"))
  bw_g <- case_when(
    !is.na(bw_raw) & bw_raw >= 100 & bw_raw <= 9000 ~ bw_raw,          # already grams
    !is.na(bw_raw) & bw_raw > 0 & bw_raw < 10 ~ bw_raw * 1000,         # kg → grams
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
  # Fallback: bwt_kg (kilograms)
  bwt_kg_val <- safe_num(get_col(df, "bwt_kg"))
  bw_from_kg <- ifelse(!is.na(bwt_kg_val) & bwt_kg_val > 0 & bwt_kg_val < 10,
                       bwt_kg_val * 1000, NA_real_)
  bw_g <- coalesce(bw_g, bw_from_kg)
  
  # --- Apgar score: q30apg (Apgar at 1 minute per ALERT CRF) ---
  apgar_val <- safe_num(get_col(df, "q30apg"))
  apgar_1 <- ifelse(!is.na(apgar_val) & apgar_val >= 0 & apgar_val <= 10, apgar_val, NA_real_)
  
  # --- SGA: pre-calculated (may be numeric 0/1 or text categories) ---
  sga_raw <- get_col(df, "sga")
  sga_n <- safe_num(sga_raw)
  sga_l <- safe_lbl(sga_raw)
  out_sga <- case_when(
    (!is.na(sga_n) & sga_n == 1) | str_detect(sga_l, "small for gestational|severely small") ~ "Yes",
    (!is.na(sga_n) & sga_n == 0) | str_detect(sga_l, "appropriate for gestational|large for gestational") ~ "No",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  out_lga <- case_when(
    str_detect(sga_l, "large for gestational") ~ "Yes",
    str_detect(sga_l, "small|appropriate") ~ "No",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # --- Preterm: pre-calculated (numeric 0/1 or text), with GA fallback ---
  preterm_raw <- get_col(df, "preterm")
  pt_n <- safe_num(preterm_raw)
  pt_l <- safe_lbl(preterm_raw)
  out_preterm <- case_when(
    (!is.na(pt_n) & pt_n == 1) | str_detect(pt_l, "preterm|yes") ~ "Yes",
    (!is.na(pt_n) & pt_n == 0) | (str_detect(pt_l, "term|no") & !str_detect(pt_l, "pre")) ~ "No",
    !is.na(ga_wks) & ga_wks < 37 ~ "Yes",
    !is.na(ga_wks) & ga_wks >= 37 ~ "No",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # --- Delivery mode: q24mode (1=SVD, 2=CS, 3=Vacuum, 5=Assisted breech) ---
  mode_raw <- get_col(df, "q24mode")
  del_mode <- case_when(
    match_any(mode_raw, nums = 1, patterns = c("spontaneous|vaginal")) ~ "Vaginal",
    match_any(mode_raw, nums = 2, patterns = c("caesarean|cesarean|c.section")) ~ "Caesarean",
    match_any(mode_raw, nums = c(3, 5), patterns = c("vacuum|assisted|instrumental")) ~ "Vaginal assisted",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  # Also check CS variable as fallback
  cs_raw <- get_col(df, "CS")
  cs_lbl <- safe_lbl(cs_raw)
  del_mode <- case_when(
    !is.na(del_mode) ~ del_mode,
    str_detect(cs_lbl, "^cs$|caesarean|cesarean") ~ "Caesarean",
    str_detect(cs_lbl, "vaginal") ~ "Vaginal",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # --- Multiple birth: q25babies (1=Singleton, 2=Multiples) ---
  babies_raw <- get_col(df, "q25babies")
  out_multiple <- case_when(
    match_any(babies_raw, nums = 2, patterns = c("multiple")) ~ "Yes",
    match_any(babies_raw, nums = 1, patterns = c("singleton")) ~ "No",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # SECTION 2: MATERNAL DEMOGRAPHICS
  # ============================================================================
  
  # --- Maternal age: q3age (numeric years) ---
  age_raw <- safe_num(get_col(df, "q3age"))
  mat_age <- ifelse(!is.na(age_raw) & age_raw >= 10 & age_raw <= 60, age_raw, NA_real_)
  
  mat_age_cat <- case_when(
    !is.na(mat_age) & mat_age < 20 ~ "<20",
    !is.na(mat_age) & mat_age >= 20 & mat_age <= 24 ~ "20-24",
    !is.na(mat_age) & mat_age >= 25 & mat_age <= 29 ~ "25-29",
    !is.na(mat_age) & mat_age >= 30 & mat_age <= 34 ~ "30-34",
    !is.na(mat_age) & mat_age >= 35 ~ "35+",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # --- Country: MULTI-SOURCE DERIVATION ---
  # Source 1: country variable (numeric 1=Benin, 2=Malawi, 3=Tanzania, 4=Uganda)
  cty_raw <- get_col(df, "country")
  cty_num <- safe_num(cty_raw)
  cty_lbl <- safe_lbl(cty_raw)
  
  country_from_var <- case_when(
    cty_num == 1 | str_detect(cty_lbl, "benin")    ~ "Benin",
    cty_num == 2 | str_detect(cty_lbl, "malawi")   ~ "Malawi",
    cty_num == 3 | str_detect(cty_lbl, "tanzania")  ~ "Tanzania",
    cty_num == 4 | str_detect(cty_lbl, "uganda")    ~ "Uganda",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # Source 2: count variable (might be original country name string or numeric)
  cnt_raw <- get_col(df, "count")
  cnt_num <- safe_num(cnt_raw)
  cnt_lbl <- safe_lbl(cnt_raw)
  
  country_from_count <- case_when(
    cnt_num == 1 | str_detect(cnt_lbl, "benin")    ~ "Benin",
    cnt_num == 2 | str_detect(cnt_lbl, "malawi")   ~ "Malawi",
    cnt_num == 3 | str_detect(cnt_lbl, "tanzania")  ~ "Tanzania",
    cnt_num == 4 | str_detect(cnt_lbl, "uganda")    ~ "Uganda",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # Source 3: hosp variable - slice off country name from "Country-Hospital-N"
  hosp_raw <- tolower(as.character(get_col(df, "hosp")))
  country_from_hosp <- case_when(
    str_detect(hosp_raw, "benin")    ~ "Benin",
    str_detect(hosp_raw, "malawi")   ~ "Malawi",
    str_detect(hosp_raw, "tanzania") ~ "Tanzania",
    str_detect(hosp_raw, "uganda")   ~ "Uganda",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # Source 4: hospn first digit → country code (1=Benin, 2=Malawi, 3=Tanzania, 4=Uganda)
  hospn_raw <- as.character(get_col(df, "hospn"))
  hospn_lbl <- safe_lbl(get_col(df, "hospn"))
  # Try to get first digit from either the raw value or the label
  hospn_first <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(substr(trimws(coalesce(hospn_lbl, hospn_raw)), 1, 1)))
  
  country_from_hospn <- case_when(
    hospn_first == 1 ~ "Benin",
    hospn_first == 2 ~ "Malawi",
    hospn_first == 3 ~ "Tanzania",
    hospn_first == 4 ~ "Uganda",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # Chain all sources (first non-NA wins)
  mat_country_parsed <- coalesce(country_from_var, country_from_count,
                                  country_from_hosp, country_from_hospn)
  
  # --- Facility ---
  # hospn may be string name or haven_labelled code; hospnam may be numeric code
  fac_lbl <- safe_lbl(get_col(df, "hospn"))
  fac_chr <- get_col_chr(df, "hospnam")
  hosp_chr <- as.character(get_col(df, "hosp"))
  facility <- coalesce(
    ifelse(nchar(fac_lbl) > 2, fac_lbl, NA_character_),   # prefer string name
    ifelse(nchar(hosp_chr) > 2, hosp_chr, NA_character_),  # fallback to hosp
    fac_chr                                                 # last resort: code
  )
  
  # --- Gravidity: q4grav (numeric) ---
  grav_val <- safe_num(get_col(df, "q4grav"))
  mat_grav <- ifelse(!is.na(grav_val) & grav_val >= 1 & grav_val <= 20, grav_val, NA_real_)
  
  # --- Parity: q6par (numeric) ---
  par_val <- safe_num(get_col(df, "q6par"))
  mat_par <- ifelse(!is.na(par_val) & par_val >= 0 & par_val <= 15, par_val, NA_real_)
  
  # --- Previous caesarean: q7ces (numeric count, or Yes/No) ---
  cs_prev_raw <- get_col(df, "q7ces")
  cs_prev_num <- safe_num(cs_prev_raw)
  mat_prev_cs <- case_when(
    !is.na(cs_prev_num) & cs_prev_num >= 0 & cs_prev_num <= 10 ~ cs_prev_num,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
  
  # --- ANC visits: q8anc (numeric count, or Yes/No for attended) ---
  anc_raw <- get_col(df, "q8anc")
  anc_num <- safe_num(anc_raw)
  mat_anc <- ifelse(!is.na(anc_num) & anc_num >= 0 & anc_num <= 20, anc_num, NA_real_)
  
  # --- HIV: q11hiv (1=Reactive/positive, 2=Non-reactive/negative, 3=Unknown, 4=Not done) ---
  hiv_raw <- get_col(df, "q11hiv")
  mat_hiv <- case_when(
    match_any(hiv_raw, nums = 1, patterns = c("reactive|positive|^yes$")) ~ "Positive",
    match_any(hiv_raw, nums = 2, patterns = c("non.reactive|negative|^no$")) ~ "Negative",
    match_any(hiv_raw, nums = c(3, 4), patterns = c("unknown|not done|not tested")) ~ "Unknown",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # --- Syphilis: q10syp (1=Reactive, 2=Non-reactive, 3=Unknown, 4=Not done) ---
  syp_raw <- get_col(df, "q10syp")
  mat_syp <- case_when(
    match_any(syp_raw, nums = 1, patterns = c("reactive|positive|^yes$")) ~ "Positive",
    match_any(syp_raw, nums = 2, patterns = c("non.reactive|negative|^no$")) ~ "Negative",
    match_any(syp_raw, nums = c(3, 4), patterns = c("unknown|not done|not tested")) ~ "Unknown",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ★ v10.9: Hypertension from q37bp (Yes/No/Not documented)
  hyp_raw <- get_col(df, "q37bp")
  mat_hyp <- case_when(
    match_any(hyp_raw, nums = 1, patterns = c("^yes$")) ~ "Yes",
    match_any(hyp_raw, nums = 2, patterns = c("^no$")) ~ "No",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ★ v10.9: Delivery location from q2ref (referral status)
  # Yes = referred from another facility; No = direct admission
  ref_raw <- get_col(df, "q2ref")
  mat_del_loc <- case_when(
    match_any(ref_raw, nums = 1, patterns = c("^yes$")) ~ "Referred from another facility",
    match_any(ref_raw, nums = 2, patterns = c("^no$")) ~ "Direct admission",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE BIRTH DATE (used for out_dob, yob, delivery_date_raw)
  # ============================================================================
  ## ★ v10.15 Fix: q23birth = actual date/time of birth (PRIMARY)
  ##   q9dob = expected date of birth / due date / GA (FALLBACK only)
  ##   Previously used q9dob (EDD) which caused negative age-at-death
  ##   for preterm births since EDD > actual DOB
  alert_dob <- {
    # Primary: q23birth (actual birth datetime)
    dob_primary <- parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "q23birth"))
    # If text parsing fails (CSV with Stata datetime ms), try Stata conversion
    if (sum(!is.na(dob_primary)) == 0) {
      dob_primary <- parse_stata_datetime(get_col(df, "q23birth"))
    }
    # Fallback: q9dob (EDD) only when actual birth date unavailable
    dob_fallback <- parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "q9dob"))
    if (sum(!is.na(dob_fallback)) == 0) {
      dob_fallback <- parse_stata_datetime(get_col(df, "q9dob"))
    }
    coalesce(dob_primary, dob_fallback)
  }
  
  # ============================================================================
  # BUILD RESULT TIBBLE
  # ============================================================================
  
  result <- tibble(
    unified_id = paste0("ALERT_", seq_len(n)),
    study_source = "ALERT",
    study_design     = "Facility-based",
    module           = "Facility birth registry",
    sample_weight    = NA_real_,
    raw_id = get_col_chr(df, "alert_id"),
    raw_id_secondary = NA_character_,
    
    study_date = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "q1date")),
    studyyear = {
      yr <- safe_num(get_col(df, "year"))
      yr <- ifelse(!is.na(yr) & yr >= 2015 & yr <= 2030, yr, NA_real_)
      coalesce(yr, as.numeric(year(parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "q1date")))))
    },
    ## ★ v10.15 Fix: q23birth = actual date/time of birth (primary)
    ##   q9dob = expected date of birth / due date / GA (fallback only)
    ##   Previously used q9dob (EDD) which caused negative age-at-death
    ##   for preterm births since EDD > actual DOB
    out_dob = alert_dob,
    yob = as.integer(year(alert_dob)),
    delivery_date_raw = alert_dob,
    conception_date = as.Date(NA),
    
    # ---- Section 1: Primary outcomes ----
    out_stillbirth = case_when(
      is_stillbirth ~ "Yes",
      is_alive ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_livebirth = case_when(
      is_alive ~ "Yes",
      is_stillbirth ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_fresh_stillbirth = case_when(
      is_fresh_sb ~ "Yes",
      has_outcome & !is_fresh_sb ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_macerated_stillbirth = case_when(
      is_mac_sb ~ "Yes",
      has_outcome & !is_mac_sb ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_stillbirth_20wks = case_when(
      is_stillbirth & !is.na(ga_wks) & ga_wks >= 20 ~ "Yes",
      is_alive ~ "No",
      is_stillbirth & is.na(ga_wks) ~ "Unknown GA",
      is_stillbirth & ga_wks < 20 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_stillbirth_28wks = case_when(
      is_stillbirth & !is.na(ga_wks) & ga_wks >= 28 ~ "Yes",
      is_alive ~ "No",
      is_stillbirth & is.na(ga_wks) ~ "Unknown GA",
      is_stillbirth & ga_wks < 28 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_nnd = out_nnd_final,
    
    out_ga_weeks = ga_wks,
    out_ga_days = ga_wks * 7,
    out_ga_method = "Clinical estimate (facility registry)",
    out_birthweight_g = bw_g,
    out_birthweight_centile = NA_real_,
    out_birthweight_zscore = NA_real_,
    out_infant_sex = infant_sex,
    out_apgar_1min = apgar_1,
    out_apgar_5min = NA_real_,
    out_apgar_10min = NA_real_,
    out_sga = out_sga,
    out_lga = out_lga,
    out_preterm = out_preterm,
    out_very_preterm = case_when(
      !is.na(ga_wks) & ga_wks < 32 ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(ga_wks) & ga_wks >= 32 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_extremely_preterm = case_when(
      !is.na(ga_wks) & ga_wks < 28 ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(ga_wks) & ga_wks >= 28 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_lbw = case_when(
      !is.na(bw_g) & bw_g < 2500 ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(bw_g) & bw_g >= 2500 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_vlbw = case_when(
      !is.na(bw_g) & bw_g < 1500 ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(bw_g) & bw_g >= 1500 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_elbw = case_when(
      !is.na(bw_g) & bw_g < 1000 ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(bw_g) & bw_g >= 1000 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_dod = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "q48dod")),
    out_ageatdeath = NA_real_,
    out_multiple = out_multiple,
    
    # ---- Section 2: Maternal demographics ----
    mat_age = mat_age,
    mat_age_cat = mat_age_cat,
    mat_marital_status = NA_character_,   # Not collected in ALERT
    mat_religion = NA_character_,          # Not collected in ALERT
    mat_education = NA_character_,         # Not collected in ALERT
    mat_literacy = NA_character_,          # Not collected in ALERT
    mat_occupation = NA_character_,        # Not collected in ALERT
    mat_ethnicity = NA_character_,         # Not collected in ALERT
    mat_country = mat_country_parsed,
    mat_facility = facility,
    mat_district = NA_character_,
    mat_urban_rural = NA_character_,
    mat_gravidity = mat_grav,
    mat_parity = mat_par,
    mat_previous_cs = mat_prev_cs,
    mat_previous_stillbirth = NA_character_,
    mat_anc_visits = mat_anc,
    mat_anc_provider = NA_character_,
    mat_hiv_status = mat_hiv,
    mat_syphilis = mat_syp,
    mat_height = NA_real_,
    mat_weight = NA_real_,
    mat_bmi = NA_real_,
    mat_muac = NA_real_,
    mat_sbp = NA_real_,
    mat_dbp = NA_real_,
    mat_hypertension = mat_hyp,           # ★ v10.9: from q37bp
    mat_preeclampsia = NA_character_,
    mat_delivery_mode = del_mode,
    mat_delivery_location = mat_del_loc,  # ★ v10.9: from q2ref (referral status)
    mat_birth_attendant = NA_character_,
    mat_prolonged_labour = NA_character_,
    mat_obstructed_labour = NA_character_,
    mat_prom = NA_character_,
    
    # ---- Section 3: Household socioeconomic indicators ----
    # Not collected in ALERT - all placeholders
    hh_ppi_score = NA_real_,
    hh_ppi_band = NA_character_,
    hh_poverty_likelihood = NA_real_,
    hh_wealth_quintile = NA_character_,
    hh_ses_binary = NA_character_,
    hh_wall_material = NA_character_,
    hh_floor_material = NA_character_,
    hh_ownership = NA_character_,
    hh_num_rooms = NA_real_,
    hh_cooking_fuel = NA_character_,
    hh_heating_fuel = NA_character_,
    hh_lighting = NA_character_,
    hh_electricity = NA_character_,
    hh_water_source = NA_character_,
    hh_sanitation = NA_character_,
    hh_hygiene = NA_character_,
    hh_mosquito_net = NA_character_,
    hh_size = NA_real_,
    hh_monthly_income = NA_real_,
    
    # ---- Location ----
    loc_country = mat_country_parsed,
    loc_region = NA_character_,
    loc_district = NA_character_,
    loc_facility = facility,
    loc_village = NA_character_,
    loc_latitude = NA_real_,
    loc_longitude = NA_real_,
    loc_urban_rural = NA_character_,
    loc_facility_type = NA_character_
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # DERIVE DATE OF DEATH AND AGE AT DEATH
  # ============================================================================
  # q48dod is the date of discharge, referral, OR death for ALL live births.
  # We must filter it so out_dod only contains actual death dates:
  #   - For neonatal deaths (out_nnd == "Yes"): use parsed q48dod
  #   - For stillbirths: out_dod = out_dob (death occurred at birth)
  #   - For discharged/referred babies: out_dod = NA
  result <- result %>%
    mutate(
      out_dod = case_when(
        out_nnd == "Yes"        ~ out_dod,    # keep parsed q48dod only for NND
        out_stillbirth == "Yes" ~ out_dob,    # stillbirth: death date = birth date
        TRUE                    ~ as.Date(NA) # discharged/referred: not a death
      ),
      out_ageatdeath = case_when(
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(out_dod) & !is.na(out_dob) ~
          as.numeric(difftime(out_dod, out_dob, units = "days")),
        out_stillbirth == "Yes" ~ 0,          # stillbirths: age at death = 0 days
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      # Safety: age at death must be non-negative and plausible (0-28 days for NND)
      out_ageatdeath = ifelse(
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(out_ageatdeath) &
          (out_ageatdeath < 0 | out_ageatdeath > 28),
        NA_real_, out_ageatdeath
      )
    )
  
  result %>% derive_outcomes() %>% ensure_complete_schema()
}
```

## 2.3 PRECISE Harmonization

```{r phase2-precise}
harmonize_precise <- function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(tibble() %>% ensure_complete_schema())
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-PROCESSING: Handle .dta import (haven_labelled variables)
  # ===========================================================================
  # When loading .dta files with haven::read_dta(), categorical variables are
  # stored as haven_labelled (numeric with value labels). We decode them to
  # get the actual text values. Continuous numeric variables (age, weight,
  # GA, etc.) are NOT labelled in Stata, so they remain numeric after this step.
  
  if (requireNamespace("haven", quietly = TRUE)) {
    df <- df %>% mutate(across(
      where(~inherits(.x, "haven_labelled")),
      ~tryCatch(as.character(haven::as_factor(.x)),
                error = function(e) as.character(.x))
    ))
  }
  
  # Normalize column names to lowercase for consistent matching
  names(df) <- tolower(names(df))
  
  # Trim whitespace from all character columns (PRECISE has leading spaces
  # in some values, e.g. deliverylocation = " District hospital")
  df <- df %>% mutate(across(where(is.character), str_trim))
  
  n <- nrow(df)
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # LOCAL HELPER: Robust Yes/No conversion
  # ===========================================================================
  # Handles: "Yes"/"No" strings, "1"/"0" strings, numeric 1/0, and
  # haven-decoded labels. Covers both .dta and .csv input formats.
  robust_yesno <- function(x) {
    x_chr <- str_trim(as.character(x))
    case_when(
      tolower(x_chr) %in% c("yes", "1", "true") ~ "Yes",
      tolower(x_chr) %in% c("no", "0", "false")  ~ "No",
      tolower(x_chr) %in% c("don't know", "unknown", "99", "na", "") ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  }
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: COUNTRY
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRECISE data dictionary: country is string ("Kenya", "Mozambique", "The Gambia")
  # In .dta it may be numeric; Stata code uses: 1=Kenya, 2=Mozambique, 3=The Gambia
  country_raw <- get_col_chr(df, "country")
  
  mat_country_parsed <- case_when(
    # String matching (priority - handles decoded labels and CSV strings)
    str_detect(tolower(country_raw), "gambia")                ~ "The Gambia",
    str_detect(tolower(country_raw), "kenya")                 ~ "Kenya",
    str_detect(tolower(country_raw), "mozambique|mo.ambique") ~ "Mozambique",
    # Numeric fallback (Stata encoding)
    safe_numeric(country_raw) == 1 ~ "Kenya",
    safe_numeric(country_raw) == 2 ~ "Mozambique",
    safe_numeric(country_raw) == 3 ~ "The Gambia",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: DELIVERY MODE (using ALERT-style dual-mode helpers)
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRECISE data dictionary (f9_mode_of_delivery / delivery_mode):
  #   1=Unassisted vaginal without episiotomy, 2=Unassisted vaginal with episiotomy,
  #   3=Operative vaginal, 4=Vaginal breech, 5=Resuscitative hysterotomy (CS),
  #   6=None (mother died undelivered), 7=Caesarean section, 99=Don't know
  #
  # ISSUE: In .dta files, this variable may be:
  #   (a) haven_labelled → decoded to text by pre-processing → pattern matching works
  #   (b) plain numeric (no labels) → pre-processing skips it → need numeric matching
  #   (c) named f9_mode_of_delivery instead of delivery_mode in some .dta versions
  
  # Dual-mode helpers (same as ALERT fix)
# Dual-mode helpers - prefixed to avoid shadowing global safe_num
  precise_safe_num <- function(x) {
    if (is.null(x)) return(rep(NA_real_, n))
    if (inherits(x, "haven_labelled")) return(as.numeric(unclass(x)))
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  }
  
  precise_safe_lbl <- function(x) {
    if (is.null(x)) return(rep(NA_character_, n))
    if (inherits(x, "haven_labelled")) {
      tryCatch(as.character(haven::as_factor(x)),
               error = function(e) as.character(x))
    } else {
      as.character(x)
    }
  }
  
  precise_match_any <- function(x, nums = NULL, patterns = NULL) {
    x_num <- precise_safe_num(x)
    x_chr <- tolower(precise_safe_lbl(x))
    result <- rep(FALSE, length(x))
    if (!is.null(nums)) {
      result <- result | (x_num %in% nums & !is.na(x_num))
    }
    if (!is.null(patterns)) {
      for (p in patterns) {
        matched <- grepl(p, x_chr, ignore.case = TRUE)
        matched[is.na(matched)] <- FALSE
        result <- result | matched
      }
    }
    result
  }
  
  # --- Gather all three possible source columns ---
  dm_raw  <- get_col(df, "delivery_mode")
  dm_fb   <- get_col(df, "mode")
  dm_fb2  <- get_col(df, "f9_mode_of_delivery")  # REDCap raw variable name
  
  # --- Extract numeric codes (works for plain numeric OR decoded-to-string "7") ---
  dm_num  <- safe_numeric(as.character(dm_raw))
  dm_num2 <- safe_numeric(as.character(dm_fb))
  dm_num3 <- safe_numeric(as.character(dm_fb2))
  dm_num_best <- coalesce(dm_num, dm_num2, dm_num3)
  
  delivery_mode_std <- case_when(
    # --- Priority 1: Direct numeric code matching (handles .dta without labels) ---
    dm_num_best %in% c(5, 7)        ~ "Caesarean",
    dm_num_best == 3                 ~ "Vaginal assisted",
    dm_num_best %in% c(1, 2, 4)     ~ "Vaginal",
    dm_num_best == 6                 ~ NA_character_,    # Mother died undelivered
    dm_num_best == 99                ~ NA_character_,    # Don't know
    
    # --- Priority 2: Pattern matching on primary (delivery_mode) ---
    precise_match_any(dm_raw, patterns = c("caesarean", "c-section", "c.section",
                                            "hysterotomy")) ~ "Caesarean",
    precise_match_any(dm_raw, patterns = c("operative", "vacuum", "forcep",
                                            "instrumental")) ~ "Vaginal assisted",
    precise_match_any(dm_raw, patterns = c("vaginal", "breech", "unassist",
                                            "cephalic", "spontaneous",
                                            "svd")) ~ "Vaginal",
    
    # --- Priority 3: Pattern matching on fallback (mode) ---
    precise_match_any(dm_fb, patterns = c("caesarean", "c-section", "c.section",
                                           "hysterotomy")) ~ "Caesarean",
    precise_match_any(dm_fb, patterns = c("operative", "vacuum", "forcep",
                                           "instrumental")) ~ "Vaginal assisted",
    precise_match_any(dm_fb, patterns = c("vaginal", "breech", "unassist",
                                           "cephalic", "spontaneous",
                                           "svd")) ~ "Vaginal",
    
    # --- Priority 4: Pattern matching on f9_mode_of_delivery ---
    precise_match_any(dm_fb2, patterns = c("caesarean", "c-section", "c.section",
                                            "hysterotomy")) ~ "Caesarean",
    precise_match_any(dm_fb2, patterns = c("operative", "vacuum", "forcep",
                                            "instrumental")) ~ "Vaginal assisted",
    precise_match_any(dm_fb2, patterns = c("vaginal", "breech", "unassist",
                                            "cephalic", "spontaneous",
                                            "svd")) ~ "Vaginal",
    
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: INFANT SEX
  # ===========================================================================
  # Data dictionary (f9_baby_sex / f9_sex_of_the_baby): 1=Male, 2=Female, 3=Indeterminate
  # Primary: sex_of_baby; fallback: sex
  sex_primary  <- get_col_chr(df, "sex_of_baby")
  sex_fallback <- get_col_chr(df, "sex")
  sex_raw <- ifelse(is.na(sex_primary) | sex_primary == "", sex_fallback, sex_primary)
  
  sex_std <- case_when(
    # String matching
    str_detect(tolower(sex_raw), "^m|\\bmale\\b") &
      !str_detect(tolower(sex_raw), "female")         ~ "Male",
    str_detect(tolower(sex_raw), "^f|female")          ~ "Female",
    str_detect(tolower(sex_raw), "indeterminate|ambiguous") ~ "Indeterminate",
    # Numeric fallback
    safe_numeric(sex_raw) == 1 ~ "Male",
    safe_numeric(sex_raw) == 2 ~ "Female",
    safe_numeric(sex_raw) == 3 ~ "Indeterminate",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: SGA / LGA
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRECISE sga variable uses full text descriptions:
  #   "Small for Gestational Age (<10th centile)"
  #   "Appropriate for Gestational Age (10th to 90th centile)"
  #   "Large for Gestational Age (>90th centile)"
  sga_raw <- get_col_chr(df, "sga")
  
  sga_std <- case_when(
    str_detect(tolower(sga_raw), "small")                ~ "Yes",
    str_detect(tolower(sga_raw), "appropriate|large")    ~ "No",
    tolower(sga_raw) %in% c("yes", "1")                 ~ "Yes",
    tolower(sga_raw) %in% c("no", "0")                  ~ "No",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  lga_std <- case_when(
    str_detect(tolower(sga_raw), "large")                ~ "Yes",
    str_detect(tolower(sga_raw), "small|appropriate")    ~ "No",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: MULTIPLE BIRTH
  # ===========================================================================
  mult_raw <- get_col_chr(df, "delivery_num_of_babies")
  
  multiple_std <- case_when(
    str_detect(tolower(mult_raw), "multiple|twin|triplet") ~ "Yes",
    str_detect(tolower(mult_raw), "singleton|single")      ~ "No",
    safe_numeric(mult_raw) == 1  ~ "No",
    safe_numeric(mult_raw) >= 2  ~ "Yes",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: LIVE BIRTH (with bornalive fallback)
  # ===========================================================================
  lb_primary  <- robust_yesno(get_col(df, "livebirth"))
  lb_fallback <- robust_yesno(get_col(df, "bornalive"))
  livebirth_std <- ifelse(!is.na(lb_primary), lb_primary, lb_fallback)
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: BIRTH WEIGHT (ensure grams, use bwt_kg as fallback)
  # ===========================================================================
  bw_raw <- get_col_num(df, "birthweight")
  bw_kg  <- get_col_num(df, "bwt_kg")
  bw_grams <- case_when(
    !is.na(bw_raw) & bw_raw >= 100 ~ bw_raw,         # Already in grams
    !is.na(bw_raw) & bw_raw < 10   ~ bw_raw * 1000,  # In kg, convert
    !is.na(bw_kg)                   ~ bw_kg * 1000,   # Fallback
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: GESTATIONAL AGE (GA_PRECISE + GA_clinical fallback)
  # ===========================================================================
  ga_primary  <- get_col_num(df, "ga_precise")
  ga_clinical <- get_col_num(df, "ga_clinical")
  ga_weeks <- ifelse(!is.na(ga_primary), ga_primary, ga_clinical)
  
  ga_days_raw <- get_col_num(df, "ga_precise_days")
  ga_days <- ifelse(!is.na(ga_days_raw), ga_days_raw,
                    ifelse(!is.na(ga_weeks), round(ga_weeks * 7), NA_real_))

  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: GA METHOD (from GA_PRECISE_code)
  # Values: Ultrasound GA_CRL_FL_HC, LMP GA, Tracer GA, Ultrasound GA_ORIGINAL_EDD, SFH GA
  # ===========================================================================
  # safe_decode not needed here: haven_labelled columns already decoded (lines 1566-1571)
  # and column names lowercased (line 1575)
  ga_code_raw <- get_col_chr(df, "ga_precise_code")
  ga_method <- case_when(
    str_detect(ga_code_raw, "(?i)ultrasound") ~ "Ultrasound",
    str_detect(ga_code_raw, "(?i)^LMP")       ~ "LMP",
    str_detect(ga_code_raw, "(?i)tracer")     ~ "Tracer",
    str_detect(ga_code_raw, "(?i)^SFH")       ~ "SFH",
    !is.na(ga_clinical) & is.na(ga_primary)   ~ "Clinical estimate",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: MATERNAL AGE (age_enrolment + age_edd fallback)
  # ===========================================================================
  age_primary  <- get_col_num(df, "age_enrolment")
  age_fallback <- get_col_num(df, "age_edd")
  mat_age_final <- ifelse(!is.na(age_primary), age_primary, age_fallback)
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: DELIVERY LOCATION
  # ===========================================================================
  # Data dictionary (f7_delivery_location):
  #   1=Home, 2=PHC, 3=District hospital, 4=Regional hospital,
  #   5=Tertiary hospital, 6=Private hospital/clinic, 7=En route,
  #   90=Other, 99=Don't know
  loc_raw      <- get_col_chr(df, "deliverylocation")
  loc_fallback <- get_col_chr(df, "deliloc")
  
  delivery_loc_std <- case_when(
    # String matching
    str_detect(tolower(loc_raw), "tertiary")                  ~ "Tertiary hospital",
    str_detect(tolower(loc_raw), "regional")                  ~ "Regional hospital",
    str_detect(tolower(loc_raw), "district")                  ~ "District hospital",
    str_detect(tolower(loc_raw), "phc|primary|health cent")   ~ "PHC",
    str_detect(tolower(loc_raw), "private")                   ~ "Private hospital/clinic",
    str_detect(tolower(loc_raw), "home")                      ~ "Home",
    str_detect(tolower(loc_raw), "en route|transit")          ~ "En route",
    str_detect(tolower(loc_raw), "other")                     ~ "Other",
    str_detect(tolower(loc_raw), "don.*know|unknown")         ~ NA_character_,
    # Numeric fallback (data dictionary codes)
    safe_numeric(loc_raw) == 1  ~ "Home",
    safe_numeric(loc_raw) == 2  ~ "PHC",
    safe_numeric(loc_raw) == 3  ~ "District hospital",
    safe_numeric(loc_raw) == 4  ~ "Regional hospital",
    safe_numeric(loc_raw) == 5  ~ "Tertiary hospital",
    safe_numeric(loc_raw) == 6  ~ "Private hospital/clinic",
    safe_numeric(loc_raw) == 7  ~ "En route",
    safe_numeric(loc_raw) == 90 ~ "Other",
```
