```{r phase2-precise}
    safe_numeric(loc_raw) == 99 ~ NA_character_,
    # Fallback to deliloc if primary is missing
    !is.na(loc_fallback) & str_detect(tolower(loc_fallback), "phc|hospital") ~ "Hospital/PHC",
    !is.na(loc_fallback) & str_detect(tolower(loc_fallback), "outside|home")  ~ "Home/En route",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: MARITAL STATUS
  # ===========================================================================
  # Data dictionary (f3_marital_status):
  #   1=Never married (or single), 2=Co-habiting, 3=Currently married (only wife),
  #   4=Currently married (one of 2+ wives), 5=Separated, 6=Divorced, 7=Widowed
  ms_raw <- get_col_chr(df, "marital_status")
  
  marital_std <- case_when(
    str_detect(tolower(ms_raw), "married|co.?habit")         ~ "Married/Cohabiting",
    str_detect(tolower(ms_raw), "never|single")              ~ "Single",
    str_detect(tolower(ms_raw), "divorced|separated")        ~ "Divorced/Separated",
    str_detect(tolower(ms_raw), "widow")                     ~ "Widowed",
    safe_numeric(ms_raw) %in% c(2, 3, 4) ~ "Married/Cohabiting",
    safe_numeric(ms_raw) == 1             ~ "Single",
    safe_numeric(ms_raw) %in% c(5, 6)    ~ "Divorced/Separated",
    safe_numeric(ms_raw) == 7             ~ "Widowed",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: EDUCATION
  # ===========================================================================
  # Data dictionary (f3_highest_school_level):
  #   1=None, 2=Primary, 3=Secondary, 4=Higher
  edu_raw <- get_col_chr(df, "highest_school_level")
  
  education_std <- case_when(
    str_detect(tolower(edu_raw), "none|never|no school")                ~ "None",
    str_detect(tolower(edu_raw), "primary")                             ~ "Primary",
    str_detect(tolower(edu_raw), "secondary")                           ~ "Secondary",
    str_detect(tolower(edu_raw), "higher|university|college|tertiary")  ~ "Higher",
    # Numeric fallback (PRECISE data dictionary codes - NOT 0-indexed!)
    safe_numeric(edu_raw) == 1 ~ "None",
    safe_numeric(edu_raw) == 2 ~ "Primary",
    safe_numeric(edu_raw) == 3 ~ "Secondary",
    safe_numeric(edu_raw) == 4 ~ "Higher",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: RELIGION
  # ===========================================================================
  # Data dictionary (f3_religion):
  #   1=Muslim, 2=Christian, 3=Traditional/spiritualist/animist,
  #   4-13=Various other religions, 14=None, 90=Other
  rel_raw <- get_col_chr(df, "religion")
  
  religion_std <- case_when(
    str_detect(tolower(rel_raw), "christian|catholic|protest|pentecost|evangel") ~ "Christian",
    str_detect(tolower(rel_raw), "muslim|islam")                                ~ "Muslim",
    str_detect(tolower(rel_raw), "traditional|spiritual|animist")               ~ "Traditional",
    str_detect(tolower(rel_raw), "none|no rel")                                 ~ "None",
    str_detect(tolower(rel_raw), "other")                                       ~ "Other",
    # Numeric fallback
    safe_numeric(rel_raw) == 1              ~ "Muslim",
    safe_numeric(rel_raw) == 2              ~ "Christian",
    safe_numeric(rel_raw) == 3              ~ "Traditional",
    safe_numeric(rel_raw) == 14             ~ "None",
    safe_numeric(rel_raw) == 90             ~ "Other",
    safe_numeric(rel_raw) %in% c(4:13)     ~ "Other",
    !is.na(rel_raw) & rel_raw != ""        ~ rel_raw,
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: OCCUPATION
  # ===========================================================================
  # Data dictionary (f3_occupation):
  #   1=Housewife, 2=Student, 3=Professional, 4=Factory, 5=Large-scale agriculture,
  #   6=Market trader, 7=Construction, 90=Other
  # Primary: occupation; fallback: f3_occupation
  occ_raw      <- get_col_chr(df, "occupation")
  occ_fallback <- get_col_chr(df, "f3_occupation")
  occ_combined <- ifelse(is.na(occ_raw) | occ_raw == "", occ_fallback, occ_raw)
  
  occupation_std <- case_when(
    str_detect(tolower(occ_combined), "professional|formal")                ~ "Employed",
    str_detect(tolower(occ_combined), "informal|self|business|trader|market") ~ "Self-employed",
    str_detect(tolower(occ_combined), "housewife|unemploy|none|home")       ~ "Unemployed/Housewife",
    str_detect(tolower(occ_combined), "student")                           ~ "Student",
    str_detect(tolower(occ_combined), "farmer|agric|factory|construction") ~ "Manual/Agricultural",
    str_detect(tolower(occ_combined), "other")                             ~ "Other",
    # Numeric fallback
    safe_numeric(occ_combined) == 1              ~ "Unemployed/Housewife",
    safe_numeric(occ_combined) == 2              ~ "Student",
    safe_numeric(occ_combined) == 3              ~ "Employed",
    safe_numeric(occ_combined) %in% c(4, 5, 7)  ~ "Manual/Agricultural",
    safe_numeric(occ_combined) == 6              ~ "Self-employed",
    safe_numeric(occ_combined) == 90             ~ "Other",
    !is.na(occ_combined) & occ_combined != ""    ~ occ_combined,
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: URBAN/RURAL
  # ===========================================================================
  ur_raw <- get_col_chr(df, "rural_urban_index")
  
  urban_rural_std <- case_when(
    str_detect(tolower(ur_raw), "peri")                                     ~ "Peri-urban",
    str_detect(tolower(ur_raw), "urban") & !str_detect(tolower(ur_raw), "peri") ~ "Urban",
    str_detect(tolower(ur_raw), "rural")                                    ~ "Rural",
    safe_numeric(ur_raw) == 1 ~ "Urban",
    safe_numeric(ur_raw) == 2 ~ "Peri-urban",
    safe_numeric(ur_raw) == 3 ~ "Rural",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-COMPUTE: HIV STATUS
  # ===========================================================================
  hiv_raw <- get_col_chr(df, "hiv_status")
  
  hiv_std <- case_when(
    tolower(hiv_raw) %in% c("yes", "positive", "reactive", "1") ~ "Positive",
    tolower(hiv_raw) %in% c("no", "negative", "non-reactive", "0") ~ "Negative",
    str_detect(tolower(hiv_raw), "unknown|don.*know|not tested") ~ "Unknown",
    safe_numeric(hiv_raw) == 1  ~ "Positive",
    safe_numeric(hiv_raw) == 0  ~ "Negative",
    safe_numeric(hiv_raw) == 99 ~ "Unknown",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # ★ v10.9: PRE-COMPUTE BIRTH ATTENDANT
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRECISE has multiple delivery_attendant_ columns (doctor, midwife, nurse, etc.)
  # Derive primary attendant based on hierarchy: Doctor > Midwife > Nurse > Other
  att_doctor  <- tolower(trimws(get_col_chr(df, "delivery_attendant_doctor")))
  att_midwife <- tolower(trimws(get_col_chr(df, "delivery_attendant_midwife")))
  att_nurse   <- tolower(trimws(get_col_chr(df, "delivery_attendant_nurse")))
  att_hw      <- tolower(trimws(get_col_chr(df, "delivery_attendant_health_worker")))
  att_tba     <- tolower(trimws(get_col_chr(df, "deliveryattendant_birthattendant")))
  att_family  <- tolower(trimws(get_col_chr(df, "delivery_attendant_family")))
  
  birth_attendant_std <- case_when(
    att_doctor == "yes"  ~ "Doctor",
    att_midwife == "yes" ~ "Midwife",
    att_nurse == "yes"   ~ "Nurse",
    att_hw == "yes"      ~ "Health worker",
    att_tba == "yes"     ~ "TBA",
    att_family == "yes"  ~ "Family member",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # BUILD RESULT TIBBLE
  # ===========================================================================
  
  result <- tibble(
    # ===== IDENTIFIERS =====
    unified_id       = paste0("PRECISE_", seq_len(n)),
    study_source     = "PRECISE",
    study_design     = "Facility-based",
    module           = "Prospective cohort",
    sample_weight    = NA_real_,
    raw_id           = get_col_chr(df, "f2a_participant_id"),
    raw_id_secondary = get_col_chr(df, "childid"),
    
    # ===== DATES =====
    study_date        = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "visit_date")),
    studyyear         = as.integer(year(parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "delivery_date")))),
    out_dob           = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "delivery_date")),
    yob               = as.integer(year(parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "delivery_date")))),
    delivery_date_raw = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "delivery_date")),
    conception_date   = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "conception_date")),
    
    # ===== SECTION 1: PRIMARY OUTCOME VARIABLES =====
    out_stillbirth           = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "stillbirth")),
    out_livebirth            = livebirth_std,
    out_nnd                  = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "neonataldeath")),
    out_fresh_stillbirth     = NA_character_,    # Not available in PRECISE analysis dataset
    out_macerated_stillbirth = NA_character_,    # Not available in PRECISE analysis dataset
    out_stillbirth_20wks     = NA_character_,    # Derived by derive_outcomes() from GA
    out_stillbirth_28wks     = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "stillbirth28")),
    out_preterm              = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "preterm")),
    out_lbw                  = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "lowbirthweight")),
    
    out_ga_weeks           = ga_weeks,
    out_ga_days            = ga_days,
    out_ga_method          = ga_method,
    out_birthweight_g      = bw_grams,
    out_birthweight_centile = get_col_num(df, "bwt_percentile"),
    out_birthweight_zscore  = get_col_num(df, "bwt_zscore"),
    out_infant_sex         = sex_std,
    out_apgar_1min         = get_col_num(df, "apgarscore_1min"),
    out_apgar_5min         = get_col_num(df, "apgarscore_5min"),
    out_apgar_10min        = NA_real_,           # Not available in PRECISE
    out_sga                = sga_std,
    out_lga                = lga_std,
    out_dod                = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "baby_death_date")),
    out_ageatdeath         = get_col_num(df, "ageatdeath"),
    out_multiple           = multiple_std,
    
    # ===== SECTION 2: MATERNAL DEMOGRAPHICS =====
    mat_age                = mat_age_final,
    mat_marital_status     = marital_std,
    mat_religion           = religion_std,
    mat_education          = education_std,
    mat_literacy           = NA_character_,       # Not available in PRECISE
    mat_occupation         = occupation_std,
    mat_ethnicity          = get_col_chr(df, "ethnicity"),
    mat_country            = mat_country_parsed,
    mat_facility           = get_col_chr(df, "health_facility"),
    mat_district           = NA_character_,       # Not available in PRECISE
    mat_urban_rural        = urban_rural_std,
    mat_gravidity          = NA_real_,            # Not directly available in PRECISE
    mat_parity             = if ("parity" %in% names(df)) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(df[["parity"]]))) else get_col_num(df, "parity"),
    mat_previous_cs        = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "previous_csection")),
    mat_previous_stillbirth = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "previous_stillbirth")),
    mat_anc_visits         = get_col_num(df, "f7_antenatal_care_number_of_visi"),
    mat_anc_provider       = NA_character_,       # Not available in PRECISE
    mat_hiv_status         = hiv_std,
    mat_syphilis           = NA_character_,       # Not available in PRECISE
    mat_height             = get_col_num(df, "maternal_height"),
    mat_weight             = get_col_num(df, "maternal_weight"),
    mat_bmi                = get_col_num(df, "maternal_bmi"),
    mat_muac               = get_col_num(df, "average_muac"),
    mat_sbp                = get_col_num(df, "average_sbp"),
    mat_dbp                = get_col_num(df, "average_dbp"),
    mat_hypertension       = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "ht_overall")),
    mat_preeclampsia       = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "pe_overall")),
    mat_delivery_mode      = delivery_mode_std,
    mat_delivery_location  = delivery_loc_std,
    mat_birth_attendant    = birth_attendant_std,  # ★ v10.9: from delivery_attendant columns
    mat_prolonged_labour   = NA_character_,       # prolonged_labour is numeric (hours), not Yes/No
    mat_obstructed_labour  = NA_character_,       # Not available in PRECISE
    mat_prom               = NA_character_,       # Not available in PRECISE
    
    # ===== SECTION 3: HOUSEHOLD SOCIOECONOMIC INDICATORS =====
    hh_ppi_score          = get_col_num(df, "ppi_score"),
    hh_ppi_band           = NA_character_,
    hh_poverty_likelihood = get_col_num(df, "extreme_poverty_line"),
    # hh_wealth_quintile: from merged PRECISE_SES file (wealth_quintile column)
    # PRECISE uses PCA-based xtile: 1=Poorest (lowest asset score) to 5=Wealthiest
    hh_wealth_quintile    = {
      wq <- get_col_num(df, "wealth_quintile")
      case_when(
        wq == 1 ~ "1 - Poorest",
        wq == 2 ~ "2 - Poor",
        wq == 3 ~ "3 - Middle class",
        wq == 4 ~ "4 - Wealthy",
        wq == 5 ~ "5 - Wealthiest",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    },
    hh_ses_binary         = NA_character_,
    hh_wall_material      = NA_character_,        # Not collected in PRECISE
    hh_floor_material     = NA_character_,        # Not collected in PRECISE
    hh_ownership          = NA_character_,        # Not collected in PRECISE
    hh_num_rooms          = NA_real_,             # Not collected in PRECISE
    hh_cooking_fuel       = get_col_chr(df, "cooking"),
    hh_heating_fuel       = get_col_chr(df, "heating"),
    hh_lighting           = get_col_chr(df, "lighting"),
    hh_electricity        = NA_character_,        # Not directly collected in PRECISE
    hh_water_source       = get_col_chr(df, "water_jmp"),
    hh_sanitation         = get_col_chr(df, "sanitation_jmp"),
    hh_hygiene            = get_col_chr(df, "hygiene_jmp"),
    hh_mosquito_net       = NA_character_,        # Not collected in PRECISE
    hh_size               = NA_real_,             # Not collected in PRECISE
    hh_monthly_income     = NA_real_,             # Not collected in PRECISE
    
    # ===== LOCATION VARIABLES =====
    loc_country       = mat_country_parsed,
    loc_region        = NA_character_,
    loc_district      = NA_character_,
    loc_facility      = get_col_chr(df, "health_facility"),
    loc_village       = get_col_chr(df, "village"),
    loc_latitude      = get_col_num(df, "villagelat"),
    loc_longitude     = get_col_num(df, "villagelong"),
    loc_urban_rural   = urban_rural_std,
    loc_facility_type = NA_character_
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # POST-PROCESSING: Add mat_age_cat from mat_age
  # ============================================================================
  result <- result %>%
    mutate(
      mat_age_cat = case_when(
        is.na(mat_age) ~ NA_character_,
        mat_age < 20 ~ "<20",
        mat_age >= 20 & mat_age < 25 ~ "20-24",
        mat_age >= 25 & mat_age < 30 ~ "25-29",
        mat_age >= 30 & mat_age < 35 ~ "30-34",
        mat_age >= 35 ~ "35+",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
  
  result %>% derive_outcomes() %>% ensure_complete_schema()
}
```

## 2.4 PTBi Harmonization

```{r phase2-ptbi}
harmonize_ptbi <- function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(tibble() %>% ensure_complete_schema())
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PRE-PROCESSING: Handle .dta import (haven_labelled variables)
  # ===========================================================================
  # When loading .dta files with haven::read_dta(), categorical variables are

  # stored as haven_labelled (numeric with value labels). We must decode them
  # BEFORE any string pattern matching. Continuous numeric variables (age, weight,
  # GA, apgar scores) are NOT labelled in Stata, so they stay numeric.
  #
  # Without this step, str_detect() sees "1" or "2" instead of "Born_Alive" 
  # or "Still_Birth", causing massive missing data.
  # ===========================================================================
  
  if (requireNamespace("haven", quietly = TRUE)) {
    df <- df %>% mutate(across(
      where(~inherits(.x, "haven_labelled")),
      ~tryCatch(as.character(haven::as_factor(.x)),
                error = function(e) as.character(.x))
    ))
  }
  
  # Normalize column names to lowercase for consistent matching
  names(df) <- tolower(names(df))
  
  # Trim whitespace from all character columns
  df <- df %>% mutate(across(where(is.character), ~trimws(as.character(.x))))
  
  n <- nrow(df)
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # LOCAL HELPERS: Robust extraction for mixed CSV / .dta input
  # ===========================================================================
  
  # Safe column extraction (returns NA vector if column missing)
  safe_col <- function(col_name) {
    if (col_name %in% names(df)) df[[col_name]] else rep(NA, n)
  }
  
  # Safe numeric extraction (handles labelled, character, and numeric)
  safe_num <- function(col_name) {
    x <- safe_col(col_name)
    if (is.null(x)) return(rep(NA_real_, n))
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  }
  
  # Safe character extraction (already decoded by pre-processing step above)
  safe_chr <- function(col_name) {
    x <- safe_col(col_name)
    if (is.null(x)) return(rep(NA_character_, n))
    as.character(x)
  }
  
  # Lowercased character for pattern matching
  safe_chr_lower <- function(col_name) {
    tolower(safe_chr(col_name))
  }
  
  # Robust Yes/No from mixed 0/1 numeric and "yes"/"no"/"Yes"/"No" strings
  as_yesno_robust <- function(x) {
    x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    case_when(
      is.na(x) | x_chr %in% c("", "na", "nan") ~ NA_character_,
      x_chr %in% c("1", "yes", "y", "true") ~ "Yes",
      x_chr %in% c("0", "no", "n", "false") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  }
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # EXTRACT RAW VARIABLES (decoded from haven_labelled by pre-processing)
  # ===========================================================================
  
  # Primary outcome variables (all decoded to character strings)
  birth_outcome_raw  <- safe_chr_lower("c_birth_outcome")
  baby_status_raw    <- safe_chr_lower("c_baby_status")
  baby_discharge_raw <- safe_chr_lower("baby_discharge_status")
  mother_status_raw  <- safe_chr_lower("c_mother_status")
  mother_disch_raw   <- safe_chr_lower("mother_discharge_status")
  mode_raw           <- safe_chr_lower("mode_of_delivery")
  c_mode_raw         <- safe_chr_lower("c_mode_of_delivery")
  sex_raw            <- safe_chr_lower("sex")
  referral_raw       <- safe_chr_lower("referral_in")
  record_type_raw    <- safe_chr_lower("record_type")
  final_diag_raw     <- safe_chr_lower("final_diagnosis")
  
  # Numeric variables
  ga_num             <- safe_num("ga")
  bw_kg              <- safe_num("birth_weight")
  bw_g2              <- safe_num("c_birth_weight_g2")
  age_raw            <- safe_num("mothers_age")
  age_c              <- safe_num("c_mothers_age")
  apgar1_raw         <- safe_num("apgar_1")
  apgar5_raw         <- safe_num("apgar_5")
  apgar10_raw        <- safe_num("apgar_10")
  multiple_raw       <- safe_num("multiple")
  
  # Final diagnosis binary flags (0/1 numeric)
  diag_hbp           <- safe_num("finaldiag_high_blood_pressure_in")
  diag_obstructed    <- safe_num("finaldiag_obstructed_labour")
  diag_malaria       <- safe_num("finaldiag_malaria_in_pregnancy")
  diag_anaemia       <- safe_num("finaldiag_anaemia_in_pregnancy")
  diag_hiv           <- safe_num("finaldiag_hiv_aids")
  diag_sepsis        <- safe_num("finaldiag_puerperal_sepsis")
  diag_uti           <- safe_num("finaldiag_urinary_tract_infectio")
  diag_pph           <- safe_num("finaldiag_pph")
  diag_aph           <- safe_num("finaldiag_aph")
  diag_ruptured      <- safe_num("finaldiag_ruptured_uterus")
  diag_preterm       <- safe_num("finaldiag_preterm")
  bba_flag           <- safe_num("bba")
  doc_iufd_flag      <- safe_num("doc_iufd")
  
  # Date variables - use c_date_of_delivery (100% complete) as PRIMARY
  # date_of_delivery only ~77% complete
  date_primary       <- safe_chr("c_date_of_delivery")
  date_secondary     <- safe_chr("date_of_delivery")
  date_admission     <- safe_chr("admission_date")
  date_discharge     <- safe_chr("discharge_date")
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PARSE DATES: Use c_date_of_delivery (100%) with date_of_delivery fallback
  # ===========================================================================
  dob_parsed   <- parse_date_multi(date_primary)
  dob_fallback <- parse_date_multi(date_secondary)
  dob_final    <- coalesce(dob_parsed, dob_fallback)
  
  adm_parsed   <- parse_date_multi(date_admission)
  disch_parsed <- parse_date_multi(date_discharge)
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # BIRTH WEIGHT: Use c_birth_weight_g2 (grams, 73%) as primary
  # birth_weight is in KG (e.g., 3.0 = 3000g), use as fallback with conversion
  # ===========================================================================
  bw_from_g2 <- ifelse(!is.na(bw_g2) & bw_g2 > 0 & bw_g2 <= 7000, bw_g2, NA_real_)
  bw_from_kg <- case_when(
    !is.na(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 & bw_kg <= 7.0  ~ bw_kg * 1000,
    !is.na(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 300  & bw_kg <= 7000 ~ bw_kg,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
  bw_final <- coalesce(bw_from_g2, bw_from_kg)
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # MATERNAL AGE: Use mothers_age with c_mothers_age fallback
  # ===========================================================================
  mat_age_final <- coalesce(age_raw, age_c)
  mat_age_final <- ifelse(!is.na(mat_age_final) & mat_age_final >= 10 & mat_age_final <= 60,
                          mat_age_final, NA_real_)
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # GESTATIONAL AGE: Validate range
  # ===========================================================================
  ga_final <- ifelse(!is.na(ga_num) & ga_num > 0 & ga_num <= 45, ga_num, NA_real_)
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # PARITY / GRAVIDITY: Check if available in .dta (PTBi maternity form 
  # collects them but CSV sample does not have them; .dta may)
  # ===========================================================================
  parity_raw    <- safe_num("parity")
  gravidity_raw <- safe_num("gravidity")
  # Try alternative column names that might exist in production .dta
  if (all(is.na(parity_raw)))    parity_raw    <- safe_num("para")
  if (all(is.na(gravidity_raw))) gravidity_raw <- safe_num("gravida")
  # number_of_children_alive might serve as proxy
  n_children_alive <- safe_num("number_of_children_alive")
  if (all(is.na(n_children_alive))) n_children_alive <- safe_num("children_alive")
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # EDUCATION / RELIGION / MARITAL STATUS / OCCUPATION / ETHNICITY:
  # These are collected on the PTBi maternity form but may not be in the
  # electronic dataset. We check for possible column names in .dta.
  # ===========================================================================
  education_raw <- safe_chr_lower("education")
  if (all(is.na(education_raw) | education_raw == "")) {
    education_raw <- safe_chr_lower("mat_education")
  }
  if (all(is.na(education_raw) | education_raw == "")) {
    education_raw <- safe_chr_lower("education_level")
  }
  
  religion_raw <- safe_chr_lower("religion")
  if (all(is.na(religion_raw) | religion_raw == "")) {
    religion_raw <- safe_chr_lower("mat_religion")
  }
  
  marital_raw <- safe_chr_lower("marital_status")
  if (all(is.na(marital_raw) | marital_raw == "")) {
    marital_raw <- safe_chr_lower("marital")
  }
  
  occupation_raw <- safe_chr_lower("occupation")
  if (all(is.na(occupation_raw) | occupation_raw == "")) {
    occupation_raw <- safe_chr_lower("mat_occupation")
  }
  
  ethnicity_raw <- safe_chr_lower("tribe")
  if (all(is.na(ethnicity_raw) | ethnicity_raw == "")) {
    ethnicity_raw <- safe_chr_lower("ethnicity")
  }
  
  district_raw <- safe_chr("district")
  if (all(is.na(district_raw) | district_raw == "")) {
    district_raw <- safe_chr("mother_s_district_of_residence")
  }
  if (all(is.na(district_raw) | district_raw == "")) {
    district_raw <- safe_chr("mat_district")
  }
  
  # Previous C-section: check for column
  prev_cs_raw <- safe_num("previous_csection")
  if (all(is.na(prev_cs_raw))) prev_cs_raw <- safe_num("prev_cs")
  
  # Previous stillbirth
  prev_sb_raw <- safe_chr_lower("previous_stillbirth")
  if (all(is.na(prev_sb_raw) | prev_sb_raw == "")) {
    prev_sb_raw <- safe_chr_lower("prev_stillbirth")
  }
  
  # ANC visits
  anc_raw <- safe_num("anc_visits")
  if (all(is.na(anc_raw))) anc_raw <- safe_num("number_of_anc_visits")
  if (all(is.na(anc_raw))) anc_raw <- safe_num("anc_attendance")
  
  # HIV status from dedicated column (fallback to finaldiag flag)
  hiv_raw <- safe_chr_lower("hiv_status")
  if (all(is.na(hiv_raw) | hiv_raw == "")) {
    hiv_raw <- safe_chr_lower("hiv")
  }
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # BUILD RESULT TIBBLE
  # ===========================================================================
  
  result <- tibble(
    # =========================================================================
    # IDENTIFIERS
    # =========================================================================
    unified_id       = paste0("PTBi_", seq_len(n)),
    study_source     = "PTBi",
    study_design     = "Facility-based",
    module           = "Facility birth registry",
    sample_weight    = NA_real_,
    raw_id           = as.character(safe_num("id")),
    raw_id_secondary = safe_chr("mother_id"),
    
    # =========================================================================
    # DATES
    # =========================================================================
    study_date       = coalesce(adm_parsed, dob_final),
    studyyear        = as.integer(year(coalesce(dob_final, adm_parsed))),
    out_dob          = dob_final,
    yob              = as.integer(year(dob_final)),
    delivery_date_raw = dob_final,
    conception_date  = as.Date(NA),
    
    # =========================================================================
    # SECTION 1: PRIMARY OUTCOME VARIABLES
    # =========================================================================
    
    # --- Stillbirth (any) ---
    # PRIMARY: c_birth_outcome (100% complete): "Still_Birth" / "Born_Alive"
    # FALLBACK: c_baby_status, baby_discharge_status, doc_iufd
    out_stillbirth = case_when(
      str_detect(birth_outcome_raw, "still")          ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(birth_outcome_raw, "alive|born_al")  ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "still")             ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "live|undoc")        ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "still")          ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "live|discharged_alive|baby_born|defect") ~ "No",
      doc_iufd_flag == 1                               ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Live birth ---
    out_livebirth = case_when(
      str_detect(birth_outcome_raw, "alive|born_al")   ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(birth_outcome_raw, "still")           ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "live|undoc|neonatal_death|immediate") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "still")             ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "live|discharged_alive|baby_born|defect|neonatal_death|immediate") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "still")          ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Fresh stillbirth ---
    # c_baby_status and baby_discharge_status distinguish fresh vs macerated
    out_fresh_stillbirth = case_when(
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "fresh_still") | 
        str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "fresh_still")  ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(birth_outcome_raw, "alive|born_al")   ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "live|undoc")        ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "macerat") | 
        str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "macerat")      ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "unknown_still")     ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Macerated stillbirth ---
    out_macerated_stillbirth = case_when(
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "macerat") | 
        str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "macerat")      ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(birth_outcome_raw, "alive|born_al")   ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "live|undoc")        ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "fresh_still") | 
        str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "fresh_still")  ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "unknown_still")     ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Stillbirth by GA thresholds (derived in post-processing below) ---
    out_stillbirth_20wks = NA_character_,
    out_stillbirth_28wks = NA_character_,
    
    # --- Neonatal death ---
    # c_baby_status: "Immediate_Neonatal_Death" indicates NND
    # baby_discharge_status: "Immediate_Neonatal_Death"
    # Only applicable if livebirth
    out_nnd = case_when(
      str_detect(birth_outcome_raw, "still")           ~ NA_character_,
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "still")             ~ NA_character_,
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "neonatal_death|immediate_neonatal") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "neonatal_death|immediate_neonatal") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "live_baby") & 
        str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "live_baby|discharged_alive") ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "live_baby")         ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_discharge_raw, "live_baby|discharged_alive|baby_born|defect") ~ "No",
      str_detect(baby_status_raw, "undocumented")      ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Gestational age ---
    out_ga_weeks = ga_final,
    out_ga_days  = ifelse(!is.na(ga_final), ga_final * 7, NA_real_),
    out_ga_method = "Clinical estimate (facility registry)",
    
    # --- Birth weight (grams) ---
    out_birthweight_g       = bw_final,
    out_birthweight_centile = NA_real_,
    out_birthweight_zscore  = NA_real_,
    
    # --- Infant sex ---
    out_infant_sex = case_when(
      str_detect(sex_raw, "^male$|^m$")   ~ "Male",
      str_detect(sex_raw, "^female$|^f$") ~ "Female",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Apgar scores ---
    out_apgar_1min  = ifelse(!is.na(apgar1_raw) & apgar1_raw >= 0 & apgar1_raw <= 10,
                             apgar1_raw, NA_real_),
    out_apgar_5min  = ifelse(!is.na(apgar5_raw) & apgar5_raw >= 0 & apgar5_raw <= 10,
                             apgar5_raw, NA_real_),
    out_apgar_10min = ifelse(!is.na(apgar10_raw) & apgar10_raw >= 0 & apgar10_raw <= 10,
                             apgar10_raw, NA_real_),
    
    # --- SGA/LGA (requires gigs R package post-processing) ---
    out_sga = NA_character_,
    out_lga = NA_character_,
    
    # --- Date/age at death ---
    out_dod        = as.Date(NA),
    out_ageatdeath = NA_real_,
    
    # --- Multiple birth ---
    # CRITICAL FIX: `multiple` is the NUMBER of babies (1=singleton, 2=twins, 3=triplets)
    # NOT a 0/1 indicator! Previous code had multiple==1 -> "Yes" which was WRONG.
    out_multiple = case_when(
      !is.na(multiple_raw) & multiple_raw >= 2 ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(multiple_raw) & multiple_raw == 1 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # =========================================================================
    # SECTION 2: MATERNAL DEMOGRAPHICS
    # =========================================================================
    
    # --- Maternal age ---
    mat_age = mat_age_final,
    
    # --- Maternal age category ---
    mat_age_cat = case_when(
      is.na(mat_age_final)       ~ NA_character_,
      mat_age_final < 20         ~ "<20",
      mat_age_final <= 24        ~ "20-24",
      mat_age_final <= 29        ~ "25-29",
      mat_age_final <= 34        ~ "30-34",
      mat_age_final >= 35        ~ "35+",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Marital status ---
    # Check if column exists in .dta (not in CSV sample)
    mat_marital_status = case_when(
      is.na(marital_raw) | marital_raw == "" ~ NA_character_,
      str_detect(marital_raw, "married|cohabit|living") ~ "Married/Cohabiting",
      str_detect(marital_raw, "single|never")           ~ "Single",
      str_detect(marital_raw, "divorced|separated")     ~ "Divorced/Separated",
      str_detect(marital_raw, "widow")                  ~ "Widowed",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Religion ---
    mat_religion = case_when(
      is.na(religion_raw) | religion_raw == "" ~ NA_character_,
      str_detect(religion_raw, "christian|catholic|protestant|anglican|pentecostal|sda|adventist|born.again|baptist|orthodox") ~ "Christian",
      str_detect(religion_raw, "muslim|islam")          ~ "Muslim",
      str_detect(religion_raw, "traditional|ancestral") ~ "Traditional",
      str_detect(religion_raw, "none|no.religion|atheist") ~ "None",
      str_detect(religion_raw, "other")                 ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Education ---
    mat_education = case_when(
      is.na(education_raw) | education_raw == "" ~ NA_character_,
      str_detect(education_raw, "no.education|none|never|no school") ~ "None",
      str_detect(education_raw, "primary|p[1-7]|grade\\s*[1-7]")    ~ "Primary",
      str_detect(education_raw, "a.level|tertiary|univ|college|degree|diploma|higher") ~ "Higher",
      str_detect(education_raw, "secondary|o.level|s[1-6]")         ~ "Secondary",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Literacy ---
    mat_literacy = NA_character_,
    
    # --- Occupation ---
    mat_occupation = case_when(
      is.na(occupation_raw) | occupation_raw == "" ~ NA_character_,
      str_detect(occupation_raw, "employed|salaried|professional|formal|civil") ~ "Employed",
      str_detect(occupation_raw, "self|business|trader|farmer|peasant|fishing")   ~ "Self-employed",
      str_detect(occupation_raw, "unemployed|housewife|not employed|none|house.?wife") ~ "Unemployed",
      str_detect(occupation_raw, "student")                                        ~ "Student",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    
    # --- Ethnicity ---
    mat_ethnicity = case_when(
      is.na(ethnicity_raw) | ethnicity_raw == "" ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ str_to_title(ethnicity_raw)
    ),
    
    # --- Country (always Uganda for PTBi) ---
    mat_country = coalesce(safe_chr("country"), "Uganda"),
    
    # --- Facility ---
    mat_facility = safe_chr("facility"),
    
    # --- District ---
    mat_district = case_when(
      !is.na(district_raw) & district_raw != "" ~ district_raw,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Urban/Rural ---
    mat_urban_rural = NA_character_,
    
    # --- Gravidity (may be in .dta but not CSV sample) ---
    mat_gravidity = ifelse(!is.na(gravidity_raw) & gravidity_raw >= 1 & gravidity_raw <= 20,
                           gravidity_raw, NA_real_),
    
    # --- Parity (may be in .dta but not CSV sample) ---
    mat_parity = ifelse(!is.na(parity_raw) & parity_raw >= 0 & parity_raw <= 15,
                        parity_raw, NA_real_),
    
    # --- Previous C-section ---
    mat_previous_cs = ifelse(!is.na(prev_cs_raw), prev_cs_raw, NA_real_),
    
    # --- Previous stillbirth ---
    mat_previous_stillbirth = case_when(
      !is.na(prev_sb_raw) & prev_sb_raw != "" ~ as_yesno_robust(prev_sb_raw),
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- ANC visits ---
    mat_anc_visits    = ifelse(!is.na(anc_raw) & anc_raw >= 0 & anc_raw <= 20,
                               anc_raw, NA_real_),
    mat_anc_provider  = NA_character_,
    
    # --- HIV status ---
    # Use dedicated column if available; fallback to finaldiag_HIV_AIDS flag
    mat_hiv_status = case_when(
      !is.na(hiv_raw) & hiv_raw != "" & str_detect(hiv_raw, "pos")     ~ "Positive",
      !is.na(hiv_raw) & hiv_raw != "" & str_detect(hiv_raw, "neg")     ~ "Negative",
      diag_hiv == 1                                                     ~ "Positive",
      diag_hiv == 0                                                     ~ NA_character_,
      str_detect(final_diag_raw, "hiv")                                 ~ "Positive",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Syphilis ---
    mat_syphilis = NA_character_,
    
    # --- Anthropometry (not available in PTBi electronic dataset) ---
    mat_height = NA_real_,
    mat_weight = NA_real_,
    mat_bmi    = NA_real_,
    mat_muac   = NA_real_,
    mat_sbp    = NA_real_,
    mat_dbp    = NA_real_,
    
    # --- Hypertension (from final_diagnosis flags) ---
    mat_hypertension = case_when(
      diag_hbp == 1 ~ "Yes",
      diag_hbp == 0 ~ "No",
      str_detect(final_diag_raw, "high.blood.pressure|hypertens|hbp") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Preeclampsia ---
    mat_preeclampsia = case_when(
      str_detect(final_diag_raw, "pre.?eclampsia|preeclampsia") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Delivery mode ---
    # PRIMARY: mode_of_delivery (76.5%), FALLBACK: c_mode_of_delivery
    mat_delivery_mode = case_when(
      str_detect(mode_raw, "normal_vaginal|vaginal_delivery|spontaneous_vaginal|svd") ~ "Vaginal",
      str_detect(mode_raw, "caesarean|c.section|c_section|cs$")                       ~ "Caesarean",
      str_detect(mode_raw, "vacuum|ventouse|forceps|instrumental")                    ~ "Vaginal assisted",
      str_detect(mode_raw, "born_before_arrival|bba")                                 ~ "Vaginal",
      str_detect(mode_raw, "breech")                                                  ~ "Vaginal",
      str_detect(mode_raw, "laparotomy")                                              ~ "Caesarean",
      # Fallback to c_mode_of_delivery
      str_detect(c_mode_raw, "vaginal")                  ~ "Vaginal",
      str_detect(c_mode_raw, "caesarean|c.section")      ~ "Caesarean",
      str_detect(c_mode_raw, "born_before_arrival|bba")  ~ "Vaginal",
      str_detect(c_mode_raw, "other")                    ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Delivery location ---
    # PTBi is facility-based, but bba flag indicates born before arrival
    mat_delivery_location = case_when(
      bba_flag == 1                                      ~ "En route/BBA",
      !is.na(safe_chr("facility")) & safe_chr("facility") != "" ~ "Hospital",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- Birth attendant ---
    mat_birth_attendant = NA_character_,
    
    # --- Prolonged labour ---
    mat_prolonged_labour = NA_character_,
    
    # --- Obstructed labour (from finaldiag flags and text) ---
    mat_obstructed_labour = case_when(
      diag_obstructed == 1 ~ "Yes",
      diag_obstructed == 0 ~ "No",
      str_detect(final_diag_raw, "obstruct") ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # --- PROM ---
    mat_prom = NA_character_,
    
    # =========================================================================
    # SECTION 3: HOUSEHOLD SOCIOECONOMIC INDICATORS
    # =========================================================================
    # PTBi has LOW household wealth data availability per data mapping.
    # These fields are mostly not captured electronically. Leave as NA.
    
    hh_ppi_score         = NA_real_,
    hh_ppi_band          = NA_character_,
    hh_poverty_likelihood = NA_real_,
    hh_wealth_quintile   = NA_character_,
    hh_ses_binary        = NA_character_,
    hh_wall_material     = NA_character_,
    hh_floor_material    = NA_character_,
    hh_ownership         = NA_character_,
    hh_num_rooms         = NA_real_,
    hh_cooking_fuel      = NA_character_,
    hh_heating_fuel      = NA_character_,
    hh_lighting          = NA_character_,
    hh_electricity       = NA_character_,
    hh_water_source      = NA_character_,
    hh_sanitation        = NA_character_,
    hh_hygiene           = NA_character_,
    hh_mosquito_net      = NA_character_,
    hh_size              = NA_real_,
    hh_monthly_income    = NA_real_,
    
    # =========================================================================
    # LOCATION VARIABLES
    # =========================================================================
    loc_country       = coalesce(safe_chr("country"), "Uganda"),
    loc_region        = NA_character_,
    loc_district      = case_when(
      !is.na(district_raw) & district_raw != "" ~ district_raw,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    loc_facility      = safe_chr("facility"),
    loc_village       = NA_character_,
    loc_latitude      = NA_real_,
    loc_longitude     = NA_real_,
    loc_urban_rural   = NA_character_,
    loc_facility_type = NA_character_
  )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # POST-PROCESSING: Derive GA-based stillbirth thresholds
  # ===========================================================================
  result <- result %>%
    mutate(
      # Stillbirth >= 20 weeks
      out_stillbirth_20wks = case_when(
        out_stillbirth == "Yes" & !is.na(out_ga_weeks) & out_ga_weeks >= 20 ~ "Yes",
        out_stillbirth == "No"  ~ "No",
        out_stillbirth == "Yes" & !is.na(out_ga_weeks) & out_ga_weeks < 20  ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      # Stillbirth >= 28 weeks (WHO late fetal death)
      out_stillbirth_28wks = case_when(
        out_stillbirth == "Yes" & !is.na(out_ga_weeks) & out_ga_weeks >= 28 ~ "Yes",
        out_stillbirth == "No"  ~ "No",
        out_stillbirth == "Yes" & !is.na(out_ga_weeks) & out_ga_weeks < 28  ~ "No",
        # Birthweight criterion: >= 1000g if GA missing
        out_stillbirth == "Yes" & is.na(out_ga_weeks) & 
          !is.na(out_birthweight_g) & out_birthweight_g >= 1000 ~ "Yes",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      
      # Age at death from discharge date minus DOB (for NNDs)
      out_ageatdeath = case_when(
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(disch_parsed) & !is.na(out_dob) & disch_parsed > out_dob ~
          as.numeric(disch_parsed - out_dob),
        TRUE ~ out_ageatdeath
      ),
      
      # If age at death > 28 days, reclassify as not NND
      out_nnd = case_when(
        !is.na(out_ageatdeath) & out_ageatdeath > 28 ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ out_nnd
      ),
      
      # Set DOD for neonatal deaths
      out_dod = case_when(
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(disch_parsed) ~ disch_parsed,
        TRUE ~ out_dod
      )
    )
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # APPLY derive_outcomes() AND ensure_complete_schema()
  # ===========================================================================
  result %>% derive_outcomes() %>% ensure_complete_schema()
}
```

## 2.5 EN-INDEPTH Harmonization

```{r phase2-enindepth}
harmonize_enindepth <- function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(tibble() %>% ensure_complete_schema())
  
  n <- nrow(df)
  
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # HELPER FUNCTIONS for .dta (haven_labelled) vs CSV (string) compatibility
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # When loading .dta files via haven::read_dta(), categorical variables are
  # stored as haven_labelled objects (numeric with value labels). CSV files
  # store these as plain strings. These helpers handle BOTH formats seamlessly.
  
  # Decode haven_labelled to character labels; pass-through for strings
  safe_decode <- function(x) {
    if (is.null(x)) return(rep(NA_character_, n))
    if (inherits(x, "haven_labelled")) {
      decoded <- tryCatch(
        as.character(haven::as_factor(x)),
        error = function(e) as.character(x)
      )
    } else {
      decoded <- as.character(x)
    }
    # Standardise known missing codes to NA
    decoded[decoded %in% c("", "-999999999", ".a", ".i", ".b", ".z",
                           "NA", "NaN", "MISSING", "missing")] <- NA_character_
    return(decoded)
  }
  
  # Extract underlying numeric value; strip haven labels if present
  safe_num <- function(x) {
    if (is.null(x)) return(rep(NA_real_, n))
    if (inherits(x, "haven_labelled")) return(as.numeric(x))
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  }
  
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # PRE-DECODE ALL KEY VARIABLES
  # This ensures correct matching regardless of file format (.dta or .csv)
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  
  # ── Country & Location ──
  country_dec <- tolower(safe_decode(get_col(df, "country")))
  hdss_dec    <- tolower(safe_decode(get_col(df, "hdss")))
  
  # ── Data Collection Module ──
  # EN-INDEPTH randomized women to two modules: "Birth Hx" vs "Pregnancy Hx"
  # This mirrors the DHS birth history vs pregnancy history distinction
  # "Pregnancy Hx" captures stillbirths directly; "Birth Hx" captures only live births
  module_raw <- safe_decode(get_col(df, "module"))
  
  # ── Primary Outcomes (Section 1) ──
  sb_num         <- safe_num(get_col(df, "sb"))              # 0/1 binary
  nnd_num        <- safe_num(get_col(df, "nnd"))             # 0/1 binary
  neonataldeath_num <- safe_num(get_col(df, "neonataldeath"))# 0/1 (may have NAs)
  livebirths_num <- safe_num(get_col(df, "livebirths"))      # 0/1 binary
  
  # alivedead: In .dta likely numeric (1=YES/alive, 2=NO/dead); in CSV string
  alivedead_dec  <- toupper(safe_decode(get_col(df, "alivedead")))
  alivedead_num  <- safe_num(get_col(df, "alivedead"))
  
  # p212B: In .dta numeric (1=BORN ALIVE, 2=BORN DEAD, 3=PREGNANCY ENDED BEFORE FULL TERM)
  p212B_dec      <- toupper(safe_decode(get_col(df, "p212B")))
  p212B_num      <- safe_num(get_col(df, "p212B"))
  
  # type: derived variable ("Livebirths", "Stillbirths")
  type_dec       <- tolower(safe_decode(get_col(df, "type")))
  
  # ── Infant Characteristics ──
  # gender: In .dta numeric (1=BOY, 2=GIRL); in CSV string
  gender_dec     <- toupper(safe_decode(get_col(df, "gender")))
  gender_num     <- safe_num(get_col(df, "gender"))
  
  # sing_mult: In .dta possibly numeric; in CSV "YES"/"NO"/"DON'T KNOW"
  # YES = multiple birth; NO = singleton
  sing_mult_dec  <- toupper(safe_decode(get_col(df, "sing_mult")))
  sing_mult_num  <- safe_num(get_col(df, "sing_mult"))
  
  # gestation1 = months for livebirths; gestation2 = months for pregnancy losses/stillbirths
  # They are mutually exclusive — coalesce picks whichever is available
  ga_months      <- coalesce(
      safe_num(get_col(df, "gestation1")),
      safe_num(get_col(df, "gestation2"))
  )
  
  # ── Maternal Demographics (Section 2) ──
  # education: In .dta numeric (0=None, 1=Primary, 2=Secondary, 3=Higher)
  # In CSV: "No education", "Primary only", "Primary & secondary", "Higher"
  education_dec  <- safe_decode(get_col(df, "education"))
  education_num  <- safe_num(get_col(df, "education"))
  
  # religion: In .dta may be haven_labelled; in CSV string
  religion_dec   <- safe_decode(get_col(df, "religion"))
  
  # Intq108: Marital status (used in production Stata code for respondent marital status)
  # In .dta numeric (1=Currently married, 2=Living with, 3=Widowed,
  #                  4=Divorced, 5=Separated, 6=Never married)
  # In CSV: String values
  intq108_dec    <- toupper(safe_decode(get_col(df, "Intq108")))
  intq108_num    <- safe_num(get_col(df, "Intq108"))
  
  # q107_combined: "Ever attended school or Madrasa" (YES/NO) 
  # Can serve as fallback for marital status (YES ≈ ever married) per mapping doc
  q107_dec       <- toupper(safe_decode(get_col(df, "q107_combined")))
  q107_num       <- safe_num(get_col(df, "q107_combined"))
  
  # q111: Literacy variable
  # In .dta may be numeric; in CSV: "CANNOT READ AT ALL", "ABLE TO READ WHOLE SENTENCE", etc.
  q111_dec       <- toupper(safe_decode(get_col(df, "q111")))
  
  # ── Parity & Gravidity ──
  # N_gravidity: actual count of total pregnancies (0-13+) — USE THIS
  # gravidity: binary flag (0/1) only — DON'T USE as primary
  n_gravidity    <- safe_num(get_col(df, "N_gravidity"))
  grav_binary    <- safe_num(get_col(df, "gravidity"))
  
  # tot_brpr: Total births in study period — parity ≈ tot_brpr - 1
  tot_brpr_num   <- safe_num(get_col(df, "tot_brpr"))
  
  # parity: categorical string ("3+", "<2") — only as last resort
  parity_dec     <- safe_decode(get_col(df, "parity"))
  
  # ── Household (Section 3) ──
  ses_dec        <- safe_decode(get_col(df, "ses"))
  
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # COUNTRY PARSING (handles both string labels and numeric codes)
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  mat_country_parsed <- case_when(
    str_detect(country_dec, "uganda|iganga") | str_detect(hdss_dec, "iganga") ~ "Uganda",
    str_detect(country_dec, "bangladesh|matlab") | str_detect(hdss_dec, "matlab") ~ "Bangladesh",
    str_detect(country_dec, "ethiopia|dabat") | str_detect(hdss_dec, "dabat") ~ "Ethiopia",
    str_detect(country_dec, "ghana|kintampo") | str_detect(hdss_dec, "kintampo") ~ "Ghana",
    str_detect(country_dec, "guinea|bissau|bandim") | str_detect(hdss_dec, "bandim") ~ "Guinea-Bissau",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # GESTATIONAL AGE: Convert months → weeks
  # gestation1 in EN-INDEPTH is recorded in months (6-11)
  # Using 4.345 weeks/month (365.25/12/7) for accurate conversion
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ga_weeks <- case_when(
    !is.na(ga_months) & ga_months >= 1 & ga_months <= 12 ~ round(ga_months * 4.345, 1),
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
  
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # PARITY: Compute numeric parity from tot_brpr
  # tot_brpr = total births including index → parity = tot_brpr - 1
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  mat_parity_computed <- case_when(
    !is.na(tot_brpr_num) & tot_brpr_num >= 1 ~ tot_brpr_num - 1,
    !is.na(tot_brpr_num) & tot_brpr_num == 0 ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
  
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # ★ v10.9: CONSTRUCT DOB FROM COMPONENTS (yob, mob, dob)
  # EN-INDEPTH stores birth date as separate year, month, day components
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  yob_val <- safe_num(get_col(df, "yob"))
  dob_day <- safe_num(get_col(df, "dob"))  # day of birth (1-31)
  mob_raw <- toupper(safe_decode(get_col(df, "mob")))  # month of birth (e.g., "JUNE")
  
  # Convert month name to number
  mob_num <- case_when(
    str_detect(mob_raw, "JAN") ~ 1L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "FEB") ~ 2L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "MAR") ~ 3L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "APR") ~ 4L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "MAY") ~ 5L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "JUN") ~ 6L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "JUL") ~ 7L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "AUG") ~ 8L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "SEP") ~ 9L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "OCT") ~ 10L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "NOV") ~ 11L,
    str_detect(mob_raw, "DEC") ~ 12L,
    TRUE ~ NA_integer_
  )
  
  # Construct date from components (only if all components valid)
  dob_constructed <- suppressWarnings(
    as.Date(ifelse(
      !is.na(yob_val) & !is.na(mob_num) & !is.na(dob_day) &
        yob_val >= 1990 & yob_val <= 2025 &
        dob_day >= 1 & dob_day <= 31,
      paste(yob_val, mob_num, dob_day, sep = "-"),
      NA_character_
    ), format = "%Y-%m-%d")
  )
  
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # ★ v10.9: CONSTRUCT DOD FROM COMPONENTS (yod, mod, dod)
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  yod_val <- safe_num(get_col(df, "yod"))
  dod_day <- safe_num(get_col(df, "dod"))  # day of death
  mod_raw <- toupper(safe_decode(get_col(df, "mod")))  # month of death
  
  mod_num <- case_when(
    str_detect(mod_raw, "JAN") ~ 1L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "FEB") ~ 2L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "MAR") ~ 3L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "APR") ~ 4L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "MAY") ~ 5L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "JUN") ~ 6L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "JUL") ~ 7L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "AUG") ~ 8L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "SEP") ~ 9L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "OCT") ~ 10L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "NOV") ~ 11L,
    str_detect(mod_raw, "DEC") ~ 12L,
    TRUE ~ NA_integer_
  )
  
  dod_constructed <- suppressWarnings(
    as.Date(ifelse(
      !is.na(yod_val) & !is.na(mod_num) & !is.na(dod_day) &
        yod_val >= 1990 & yod_val <= 2025 &
        dod_day >= 1 & dod_day <= 31,
      paste(yod_val, mod_num, dod_day, sep = "-"),
      NA_character_
    ), format = "%Y-%m-%d")
  )
  
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # BUILD HARMONIZED TIBBLE
  # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  
  result <- tibble(
    unified_id = paste0("ENINDEPTH_", seq_len(n)),
    study_source = "EN-INDEPTH",
    study_design     = "Population-based",
    # Map raw EN-INDEPTH module: "Birth Hx" / "Pregnancy Hx" → harmonized values
    module = case_when(
      str_detect(module_raw, "(?i)pregnancy") ~ "HDSS pregnancy history",
      str_detect(module_raw, "(?i)birth")     ~ "HDSS birth history",
      TRUE                                    ~ "HDSS pregnancy surveillance"
    ),
    sample_weight    = NA_real_,
    raw_id = get_col_chr(df, "Id"),
    raw_id_secondary = get_col_chr(df, "interview__key"),
    
    study_date = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "int_date")),
    studyyear = coalesce(
      safe_num(get_col(df, "yointerview")),
      safe_num(get_col(df, "year"))
    ),
    # ★ v10.9: Use constructed DOB from yob/mob/dob components
    out_dob = dob_constructed,
    yob = safe_num(get_col(df, "yob")),
    delivery_date_raw = dob_constructed,  # delivery date = DOB for EN-INDEPTH
    conception_date = as.Date(NA),
    
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SECTION 1: PRIMARY OUTCOMES
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    
    # Stillbirth: Primary source = sb (0/1); fallbacks = p212B, type
    out_stillbirth = case_when(
      sb_num == 1 ~ "Yes",
      sb_num == 0 ~ "No",
      # Fallback: p212B (1=BORN ALIVE, 2=BORN DEAD, 3=ENDED BEFORE TERM)
      str_detect(p212B_dec, "BORN DEAD") | p212B_num == 2 ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(p212B_dec, "BORN ALIVE") | p212B_num == 1 ~ "No",
      # Fallback: type variable
      str_detect(type_dec, "stillbirth") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(type_dec, "livebirth") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Live birth: Primary = sb inverted; fallbacks = livebirths, alivedead, p212B, type
    out_livebirth = case_when(
      sb_num == 0 ~ "Yes",
      sb_num == 1 ~ "No",
      livebirths_num == 1 ~ "Yes",
      livebirths_num == 0 ~ "No",
      # alivedead: In CSV "YES"/"NO"; in .dta numeric (1=YES, 2=NO)
      str_detect(alivedead_dec, "^YES$") | alivedead_num == 1 ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(alivedead_dec, "^NO$")  | alivedead_num == 2 ~ "No",
      str_detect(p212B_dec, "BORN ALIVE") | p212B_num == 1 ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(p212B_dec, "BORN DEAD")  | p212B_num == 2 ~ "No",
      str_detect(type_dec, "livebirth") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(type_dec, "stillbirth") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Neonatal death: Primary = nnd; fallback = neonataldeath
    # Only applicable to live births (stillbirths get NA)
    out_nnd = case_when(
      sb_num == 1 ~ NA_character_,
      nnd_num == 1 | neonataldeath_num == 1 ~ "Yes",
      nnd_num == 0 | neonataldeath_num == 0 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Fresh stillbirth: p212B = BORN DEAD only (no macerated distinction in EN-INDEPTH)
    out_fresh_stillbirth = case_when(
      sb_num == 1 & (str_detect(p212B_dec, "BORN DEAD") | p212B_num == 2) ~ "Yes",
      sb_num == 0 ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_macerated_stillbirth = NA_character_,
    
    # GA-based stillbirth classifications (derived after GA conversion)
    out_stillbirth_20wks = case_when(
      sb_num == 1 & !is.na(ga_weeks) & ga_weeks >= 20 ~ "Yes",
      sb_num == 1 & !is.na(ga_weeks) & ga_weeks < 20  ~ "No",
      sb_num == 0 ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_stillbirth_28wks = case_when(
      sb_num == 1 & !is.na(ga_weeks) & ga_weeks >= 28 ~ "Yes",
      sb_num == 1 & !is.na(ga_weeks) & ga_weeks < 28  ~ "No",
      sb_num == 0 ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Gestational age in WEEKS (converted from months × 4.345)
    out_ga_weeks = ga_weeks,
    out_ga_days = ga_weeks * 7,
    out_ga_method = "Maternal recall",
    
    # Birthweight: Not available in EN-INDEPTH
    out_birthweight_g = NA_real_,
    out_birthweight_centile = NA_real_,
    out_birthweight_zscore = NA_real_,
    
    # Infant sex: gender in .dta = numeric (1=BOY, 2=GIRL); in CSV = string
    out_infant_sex = case_when(
      str_detect(gender_dec, "BOY|MALE")   | gender_num == 1 ~ "Male",
      str_detect(gender_dec, "GIRL|FEMALE") | gender_num == 2 ~ "Female",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Apgar: Not available in EN-INDEPTH
    out_apgar_1min = NA_real_,
    out_apgar_5min = NA_real_,
    out_apgar_10min = NA_real_,
    out_sga = NA_character_,
    out_lga = NA_character_,
    # ★ v10.9: Use constructed DOD from yod/mod/dod components
    out_dod = dod_constructed,
    
    # Age at death in days - use agedead_d if available, else compute from DOB/DOD
    out_ageatdeath = coalesce(
      safe_num(get_col(df, "agedead_d")),
      as.numeric(difftime(dod_constructed, dob_constructed, units = "days"))
    ),
    
    # Multiple birth: sing_mult YES = multiple birth; NO = singleton
    # In .dta possibly numeric; in CSV string "YES"/"NO"/"DON'T KNOW"
    out_multiple = case_when(
      # String matching (works for both CSV and decoded .dta)
      !is.na(sing_mult_dec) & str_detect(sing_mult_dec, "^YES$|MULTIPLE")  ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(sing_mult_dec) & str_detect(sing_mult_dec, "^NO$|SINGLETON")  ~ "No",
      !is.na(sing_mult_dec) & str_detect(sing_mult_dec, "DON.T KNOW")      ~ NA_character_,
      # Numeric fallback if decode failed
      is.na(sing_mult_dec) & sing_mult_num == 1 ~ "Yes",
      is.na(sing_mult_dec) & (sing_mult_num == 0 | sing_mult_num == 2) ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SECTION 2: MATERNAL DEMOGRAPHICS
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    
    # Maternal age: coalesce womanage (computed from Gregorian calendar) and womanage2 (from CMC)
    mat_age = coalesce(
      safe_num(get_col(df, "womanage")),
      safe_num(get_col(df, "womanage2"))
    ),
    
    # Marital status from Intq108 (used in production Stata code)
    # Numeric codes: 1=Currently married, 2=Living with, 3=Widowed,
    #                4=Divorced, 5=Separated, 6=Never married
    # -999999999 is missing code (already handled by safe_decode)
    mat_marital_status = case_when(
      # String matching (decoded labels from .dta or CSV strings)
      str_detect(intq108_dec, "CURRENTLY MARRIED|LIVING WITH") ~ "Married/Cohabiting",
      str_detect(intq108_dec, "NEVER MARRIED") ~ "Single",
      str_detect(intq108_dec, "DIVORCED|SEPARATED") ~ "Divorced/Separated",
      str_detect(intq108_dec, "WIDOWED") ~ "Widowed",
      # Numeric fallback (for unlabelled .dta or edge cases)
      intq108_num %in% c(1, 2) ~ "Married/Cohabiting",
      intq108_num == 6 ~ "Single",
      intq108_num %in% c(4, 5) ~ "Divorced/Separated",
      intq108_num == 3 ~ "Widowed",
      # Last resort: q107_combined (ever married YES/NO)
      str_detect(q107_dec, "^YES$") | q107_num == 1 ~ "Married/Cohabiting",
      str_detect(q107_dec, "^NO$")  | q107_num == 2 ~ "Single",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Religion: Standardise to Christian/Muslim/Traditional/Other-None
    mat_religion = case_when(
      str_detect(tolower(religion_dec), "christian|catholic|protestant|pentecostal|sda|adventist|anglican") ~ "Christian",
      str_detect(tolower(religion_dec), "muslim|islam") ~ "Muslim",
      str_detect(tolower(religion_dec), "traditional|ancestral") ~ "Traditional",
      str_detect(tolower(religion_dec), "other|none") ~ "Other/None",
      # Numeric fallback: common coding 1=Christian, 2=Muslim, 3=Traditional, 4=Other/None
      !is.na(religion_dec) ~ religion_dec,   # pass through if no pattern matched but value exists
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Education: In .dta numeric (0=None, 1=Primary, 2=Secondary, 3=Higher)
    # In CSV: "No education", "Primary only", "Primary & secondary", "Higher"
    mat_education = case_when(
      str_detect(tolower(education_dec), "no educ|none") | (!is.na(education_num) & education_num == 0) ~ "None",
      str_detect(tolower(education_dec), "primary only|^primary$") | (!is.na(education_num) & education_num == 1) ~ "Primary",
      str_detect(tolower(education_dec), "secondary|primary.*secondary") | (!is.na(education_num) & education_num == 2) ~ "Secondary",
      str_detect(tolower(education_dec), "higher|university|tertiary|college") | (!is.na(education_num) & education_num == 3) ~ "Higher",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Literacy from q111
    # Values: "CANNOT READ AT ALL", "ABLE TO READ WHOLE SENTENCE",
    #         "ABLE TO READ ONLY PART OF THE SENTENCE", "NO CARD WITH REQUIRED LANGUAGE"
    mat_literacy = case_when(
      str_detect(q111_dec, "CANNOT READ") ~ "No",
      str_detect(q111_dec, "ABLE TO READ") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(q111_dec, "NO CARD") ~ NA_character_,
      # Numeric fallback: common coding might be 0=Cannot, 1=Partial, 2=Full
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Occupation: Not available in EN-INDEPTH
    mat_occupation = NA_character_,
    
    # Ethnicity: Use country-specific q123_ variables
    # q123_ug = Uganda, q123_gh = Ghana, q123_bd = Bangladesh,
    # q123_et = Ethiopia, q123_gw = Guinea-Bissau
    mat_ethnicity = coalesce(
      safe_decode(get_col(df, "q123_ug")),
      safe_decode(get_col(df, "q123_gh")),
      safe_decode(get_col(df, "q123_bd")),
      safe_decode(get_col(df, "q123_et")),
      safe_decode(get_col(df, "q123_gw"))
    ),
    
    # Country & facility
    mat_country = mat_country_parsed,
    mat_facility = str_to_title(safe_decode(get_col(df, "hdss"))),
    mat_district = NA_character_,
    mat_urban_rural = NA_character_,
    
    # Gravidity: Use N_gravidity (actual count) NOT gravidity (binary flag)
    mat_gravidity = coalesce(n_gravidity, 
                             # fallback: if N_gravidity missing, at least use binary
                             ifelse(grav_binary == 1, NA_real_, grav_binary)),
    
    # Parity: Computed from tot_brpr - 1 (total births minus current)
    mat_parity = mat_parity_computed,
    
    mat_previous_cs = NA_real_,
    mat_previous_stillbirth = NA_character_,
    mat_anc_visits = NA_real_,
    mat_anc_provider = NA_character_,
    mat_hiv_status = NA_character_,
    mat_syphilis = NA_character_,
    mat_height = NA_real_,
    mat_weight = NA_real_,
    mat_bmi = NA_real_,
    mat_muac = NA_real_,
    mat_sbp = NA_real_,
    mat_dbp = NA_real_,
    mat_hypertension = NA_character_,
    mat_preeclampsia = NA_character_,
    mat_delivery_mode = NA_character_,
    mat_delivery_location = NA_character_,
    mat_birth_attendant = NA_character_,
    mat_prolonged_labour = NA_character_,
    mat_obstructed_labour = NA_character_,
    mat_prom = NA_character_,
    
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SECTION 3: HOUSEHOLD SOCIOECONOMIC INDICATORS
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    
    hh_ppi_score = NA_real_,
    hh_ppi_band = NA_character_,
    hh_poverty_likelihood = NA_real_,
    # hh_wealth_quintile: EN-INDEPTH quintile is REVERSED (1=Wealthiest, 5=Poorest)
    # per data dictionary. We reverse to match unified standard: 1=Poorest, 5=Wealthiest
    hh_wealth_quintile = {
      q_raw <- safe_num(get_col(df, "quintile"))
      q_reversed <- ifelse(!is.na(q_raw) & q_raw >= 1 & q_raw <= 5, 6L - as.integer(q_raw), NA_integer_)
      case_when(
        q_reversed == 1 ~ "1 - Poorest",
        q_reversed == 2 ~ "2 - Poor",
        q_reversed == 3 ~ "3 - Middle class",
        q_reversed == 4 ~ "4 - Wealthy",
        q_reversed == 5 ~ "5 - Wealthiest",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    },
    
    # SES binary: In .dta may be haven_labelled; in CSV "Poor"/"Rich"
    hh_ses_binary = case_when(
      str_detect(tolower(ses_dec), "poor") ~ "Poor",
      str_detect(tolower(ses_dec), "rich") ~ "Rich",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    hh_wall_material = NA_character_,
    hh_floor_material = NA_character_,
    hh_ownership = NA_character_,
    hh_num_rooms = NA_real_,
    hh_cooking_fuel = NA_character_,
    hh_heating_fuel = NA_character_,
    hh_lighting = NA_character_,
    hh_electricity = NA_character_,
    hh_water_source = NA_character_,
    hh_sanitation = NA_character_,
    hh_hygiene = NA_character_,
    hh_mosquito_net = NA_character_,
    hh_size = NA_real_,
    hh_monthly_income = NA_real_,
    
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # LOCATION VARIABLES
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    
    loc_country = mat_country_parsed,
    loc_region = NA_character_,
    loc_district = NA_character_,
    loc_facility = str_to_title(safe_decode(get_col(df, "hdss"))),
    loc_village = NA_character_,
    loc_latitude = NA_real_,
    loc_longitude = NA_real_,
    loc_urban_rural = NA_character_,
    loc_facility_type = NA_character_
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # POST-PROCESSING: Add mat_age_cat from mat_age
  # ============================================================================
  result <- result %>%
    mutate(
      mat_age_cat = case_when(
        is.na(mat_age) ~ NA_character_,
        mat_age < 20 ~ "<20",
        mat_age >= 20 & mat_age < 25 ~ "20-24",
        mat_age >= 25 & mat_age < 30 ~ "25-29",
        mat_age >= 30 & mat_age < 35 ~ "30-34",
        mat_age >= 35 ~ "35+",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
  
  result %>% derive_outcomes() %>% ensure_complete_schema()
}
```

## 2.6 WHOMCS Harmonization (29 Countries) - REWRITTEN FOR .dta SUPPORT

```{r phase2-whomcs-update}
harmonize_whomcs <- function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(tibble() %>% ensure_complete_schema())
  
  # ============================================================================
  # ★ CHANGED: PRE-PROCESSING — Decode haven_labelled variables FIRST
  # ============================================================================
  # When WHOMCS is loaded from .dta, categorical variables (birthstat, neostat,
  # sex, delabort_mode, maritalstatus, etc.) arrive as haven_labelled objects
  # (numeric codes with text labels). Without decoding, string matching on
  # "alive", "stillbirth", "dead" FAILS because the values appear as "1", "2", "3".
  #
  # This step decodes ALL haven_labelled columns to their label text BEFORE any
  # matching logic. Continuous numeric variables (age, bw, ga, apgar) are NOT
  # haven_labelled in the .dta, so they remain numeric and are unaffected.
  # ============================================================================
  
  # --- Step A: Save numeric codes from key variables BEFORE decoding ---
  # (needed as fallback if label decoding returns unhelpful text)
  birthstat_num_pre <- if ("birthstat" %in% names(df) && inherits(df[["birthstat"]], "haven_labelled")) {
    as.numeric(unclass(df[["birthstat"]]))
  } else {
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(df[["birthstat"]])))
  }
  
  neostat_num_pre <- if ("neostat" %in% names(df) && inherits(df[["neostat"]], "haven_labelled")) {
    as.numeric(unclass(df[["neostat"]]))
  } else {
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(df[["neostat"]])))
  }
  
  sex_num_pre <- if ("sex" %in% names(df) && inherits(df[["sex"]], "haven_labelled")) {
    as.numeric(unclass(df[["sex"]]))
  } else {
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(df[["sex"]])))
  }
  
  delmode_num_pre <- if ("delabort_mode" %in% names(df) && inherits(df[["delabort_mode"]], "haven_labelled")) {
    as.numeric(unclass(df[["delabort_mode"]]))
  } else {
    suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(df[["delabort_mode"]])))
  }
  
  # ★ CHANGED: Save facilitycod labels BEFORE bulk decoding
  # In the .dta, facilitycod has value labels mapping codes to facility names
  facilitycod_lbl <- if ("facilitycod" %in% names(df) && inherits(df[["facilitycod"]], "haven_labelled")) {
    tryCatch(as.character(haven::as_factor(df[["facilitycod"]])),
             error = function(e) rep(NA_character_, nrow(df)))
  } else {
    rep(NA_character_, nrow(df))
  }
  
  # --- Step B: Decode ALL haven_labelled columns to character ---
  if (requireNamespace("haven", quietly = TRUE)) {
    df <- df %>% mutate(across(
      where(~inherits(.x, "haven_labelled")),
      ~tryCatch(as.character(haven::as_factor(.x)),
                error = function(e) as.character(.x))
    ))
  }
  
  # --- Step C: Trim whitespace from all character columns ---
  # (Use tryCatch for columns with encoding issues - e.g. cp1252 in WHOMCS)
  safe_trim <- function(col) {
    tryCatch(
      trimws(as.character(col)),
      error = function(e) {
        # Force encoding to UTF-8, replacing invalid bytes
        as.character(iconv(as.character(col), from = "", to = "UTF-8", sub = ""))
      }
    )
  }
  df <- df %>% mutate(across(where(is.character), safe_trim))
  
  n <- nrow(df)
  
  # ============================================================================
  # HELPER: Robust Yes/No from mixed 0/1 numeric and "yes"/"no" strings
  # ============================================================================
  robust_yesno <- function(x) {
    x_chr <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
    case_when(
      is.na(x) | x_chr %in% c("", "na", "nan") ~ NA_character_,
      x_chr %in% c("yes", "y", "1", "true") ~ "Yes",
      x_chr %in% c("no", "n", "0", "false") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  }
  
  # ============================================================================
  # EXTRACT DECODED COLUMNS (all now character after pre-processing)
  # ============================================================================
  
  birthstat_chr  <- tolower(trimws(get_col_chr(df, "birthstat")))
  neostat_chr    <- tolower(trimws(get_col_chr(df, "neostat")))
  sex_chr        <- tolower(trimws(get_col_chr(df, "sex")))
  country_chr    <- get_col_chr(df, "country")
  delmode_chr    <- tolower(trimws(get_col_chr(df, "delabort_mode")))
  marital_chr    <- get_col_chr(df, "maritalstatus")
  
  # Indicator variables (decoded to long descriptive text)
  sb_ind_chr     <- tolower(get_col_chr(df, "stillbirth_indicator"))
  lfd_ind_chr    <- tolower(get_col_chr(df, "lfd_indicator"))
  enm_ind_chr    <- tolower(get_col_chr(df, "enm_indicator"))
  pnm_ind_chr    <- tolower(get_col_chr(df, "pnm_indicator"))
  
  # Numeric variables (these were NOT haven_labelled, stay numeric)
  num_neo_num    <- get_col_num(df, "num_neo")
  
  # WHO_REGION
  who_region_chr <- get_col_chr(df, "who_region")
  
  # ============================================================================
  # ★ CHANGED: FACILITY — Decode facilitycod labels, with fallbacks
  # ============================================================================
  # Priority 1: facilitycod haven labels (decoded before bulk decoding)
  # Priority 2: name_fac (actual facility name, 76% complete in CSV)
  # Priority 3: FACILITY_ID (country+code combo, 100% complete)
  # Priority 4: facilitycod as numeric string (last resort)
  
  name_fac_chr     <- get_col_chr(df, "name_fac")
  facility_id_chr  <- get_col_chr(df, "facility_id")
  facilitycod_chr  <- get_col_chr(df, "facilitycod")
  
  # facilitycod_lbl was extracted before decoding — check if it has real names
  # (if it's just the numeric code repeated as string, it's not useful)
  facilitycod_lbl_useful <- ifelse(
    !is.na(facilitycod_lbl) & nchar(facilitycod_lbl) > 3 &
      !grepl("^[0-9]+$", facilitycod_lbl),
    facilitycod_lbl, NA_character_
  )
  
  facility_best <- coalesce(
    facilitycod_lbl_useful,                                # .dta decoded label
    ifelse(!is.na(name_fac_chr) & name_fac_chr != "",
           name_fac_chr, NA_character_),                   # name_fac
    ifelse(!is.na(facility_id_chr) & facility_id_chr != "",
           facility_id_chr, NA_character_),                # FACILITY_ID (e.g. "AFG11")
    ifelse(!is.na(facilitycod_chr) & facilitycod_chr != "",
           facilitycod_chr, NA_character_)                 # bare code as last resort
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # ★ CHANGED: OUTCOMES — Dual matching (decoded strings + numeric fallback)
  # ============================================================================
  # birthstat: 1=alive, 2=fresh stillbirth, 3=macerated stillbirth
  # After decoding: "alive", "fresh stillbirth", "macerated stillbirth"
  # Numeric fallback handles case where labels didn't decode
  
  is_alive_str      <- birthstat_chr == "alive" & !is.na(birthstat_chr)
  is_fresh_sb_str   <- str_detect(birthstat_chr, "fresh") & !is.na(birthstat_chr)
  is_mac_sb_str     <- str_detect(birthstat_chr, "macerat") & !is.na(birthstat_chr)
  is_any_sb_str     <- str_detect(birthstat_chr, "stillbirth") & !is.na(birthstat_chr)
  
  is_alive_num      <- birthstat_num_pre == 1 & !is.na(birthstat_num_pre)
  is_fresh_sb_num   <- birthstat_num_pre == 2 & !is.na(birthstat_num_pre)
  is_mac_sb_num     <- birthstat_num_pre == 3 & !is.na(birthstat_num_pre)
  is_any_sb_num     <- birthstat_num_pre %in% c(2, 3) & !is.na(birthstat_num_pre)
  
  # Combined: string match OR numeric match
  is_alive    <- is_alive_str | is_alive_num
  is_fresh_sb <- is_fresh_sb_str | is_fresh_sb_num
  is_mac_sb   <- is_mac_sb_str | is_mac_sb_num
  is_sb       <- is_any_sb_str | is_any_sb_num
  has_outcome <- is_alive | is_sb
  
  # neostat: 1=alive, 2=dead
  neo_alive_str <- neostat_chr == "alive" & !is.na(neostat_chr)
  neo_dead_str  <- neostat_chr == "dead" & !is.na(neostat_chr)
  neo_alive_num <- neostat_num_pre == 1 & !is.na(neostat_num_pre)
  neo_dead_num  <- neostat_num_pre == 2 & !is.na(neostat_num_pre)
  
  neo_alive <- neo_alive_str | neo_alive_num
  neo_dead  <- neo_dead_str | neo_dead_num
  
  # ============================================================================
  # ★ CHANGED: DELIVERY MODE — String + numeric dual matching
  # ============================================================================
  # delabort_mode: 1=vaginal delivery, 2=forceps, 3=vacuum aspiration,
  #                4=caesarean section, 5+=other
  
  mat_delivery_mode_std <- case_when(
    # Numeric code matching (handles .dta where labels didn't decode)
    delmode_num_pre == 4 ~ "Caesarean",
    delmode_num_pre %in% c(2, 3) ~ "Vaginal assisted",
    delmode_num_pre == 1 ~ "Vaginal",
    !is.na(delmode_num_pre) & delmode_num_pre >= 5 ~ "Other",
    # String pattern matching (handles decoded labels and CSV strings)
    str_detect(delmode_chr, "caesarean|c-section|c.section") ~ "Caesarean",
    str_detect(delmode_chr, "forcep|vacuum|instrumental") ~ "Vaginal assisted",
    str_detect(delmode_chr, "vaginal") ~ "Vaginal",
    !is.na(delmode_chr) & delmode_chr != "" ~ "Other",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # ★ CHANGED: INFANT SEX — String + numeric dual matching
  # ============================================================================
  # WHOMCS sex variable is STRING in CSV ("male"/"female"), not numeric
  # The sample shows: "male" (968), "female" (931), missing (12)
  infant_sex_std <- case_when(
    # Numeric code matching (for .dta with haven_labelled)
    sex_num_pre == 1 ~ "Male",
    sex_num_pre == 2 ~ "Female",
    # String pattern matching (handles CSV strings and decoded labels)
    # Use more permissive pattern - contains "male" but not "female"
    str_detect(sex_chr, "male") & !str_detect(sex_chr, "female") ~ "Male",
    str_detect(sex_chr, "female") ~ "Female",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # BUILD RESULT TIBBLE
  # ============================================================================
  
  result <- tibble(
    unified_id = paste0("WHOMCS_", seq_len(n)),
    study_source = "WHOMCS",
    study_design     = "Facility-based",
    module           = "Facility cross-sectional survey",
    sample_weight    = NA_real_,
    raw_id = get_col_chr(df, "mother_id"),
    raw_id_secondary = get_col_chr(df, "baby_id"),
    
    # ── Dates ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    study_date = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "datehosparrival")),
    studyyear = as.integer(year(parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "datehosparrival")))),
    out_dob = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "datedelorabort")),
    yob = as.integer(year(parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "datedelorabort")))),
    delivery_date_raw = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "datedelorabort")),
    conception_date = as.Date(NA),
    
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SECTION 1: PRIMARY OUTCOME VARIABLES  ★ CHANGED — dual matching
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    
    # STILLBIRTH: uses pre-computed boolean vectors (string + numeric combined)
    out_stillbirth = case_when(
      is_sb    ~ "Yes",
      is_alive ~ "No",
      # Fallback to indicator variables
      str_detect(sb_ind_chr, "stillbirth") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(sb_ind_chr, "born alive")  ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_livebirth = case_when(
      is_alive ~ "Yes",
      is_sb    ~ "No",
      str_detect(sb_ind_chr, "born alive")  ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(sb_ind_chr, "stillbirth") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_fresh_stillbirth = case_when(
      is_fresh_sb ~ "Yes",
      is_alive    ~ "No",
      is_mac_sb   ~ "No",
      str_detect(lfd_ind_chr, "fresh")      ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_macerated_stillbirth = case_when(
      is_mac_sb   ~ "Yes",
      is_alive    ~ "No",
      is_fresh_sb ~ "No",
      str_detect(lfd_ind_chr, "macerated")  ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Stillbirth ≥20 weeks: STILLBIRTH_INDICATOR (ICD definition, ≥22 wks)
    out_stillbirth_20wks = case_when(
      str_detect(sb_ind_chr, "stillbirth") ~ "Yes",
```
