```{r phase2-whomcs-update}
      str_detect(sb_ind_chr, "born alive")  ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    # Stillbirth ≥28 weeks: LFD_INDICATOR (WHO definition, ≥28 wks)
    out_stillbirth_28wks = case_when(
      str_detect(lfd_ind_chr, "stillbirth") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(lfd_ind_chr, "born alive")  ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # NEONATAL DEATH: uses pre-computed boolean vectors
    # Only applicable to live births (stillbirths get NA)
    out_nnd = case_when(
      is_sb      ~ NA_character_,
      neo_dead   ~ "Yes",
      neo_alive  ~ "No",
      # Fallback to ENM_INDICATOR
      str_detect(enm_ind_chr, "neonatal death") ~ "Yes",
      str_detect(enm_ind_chr, "alive")           ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # Numeric outcomes (not haven_labelled — unaffected by pre-processing)
    out_ga_weeks = get_col_num(df, "ga"),
    out_ga_days = get_col_num(df, "ga") * 7,
    out_ga_method = "Clinical estimate (facility records)",
    out_birthweight_g = get_col_num(df, "bw"),
    out_birthweight_centile = NA_real_,
    out_birthweight_zscore = NA_real_,
    
    # ★ CHANGED: Infant sex — dual matching
    out_infant_sex = infant_sex_std,
    
    out_apgar_1min = NA_real_,
    out_apgar_5min = get_col_num(df, "apgar"),
    out_apgar_10min = NA_real_,
    out_sga = NA_character_,
    out_lga = NA_character_,
    out_dod = parse_date_multi(get_col(df, "neo_date")),
    out_ageatdeath = NA_real_,
    
    # Multiple births: num_neo (total neonates delivered)
    out_multiple = case_when(
      num_neo_num > 1  ~ "Yes",
      num_neo_num == 1 ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SECTION 2: MATERNAL DEMOGRAPHICS
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    
    mat_age = get_col_num(df, "age"),
    mat_marital_status = marital_chr,
    mat_religion = NA_character_,
    # Education: Convert years of schooling to standard categories
    # None (0), Primary (1-6), Secondary (7-12), Higher (>12)
    mat_education = {
      yrs <- get_col_num(df, "yearsschool")
      case_when(
        is.na(yrs) ~ NA_character_,
        yrs == 0 ~ "None",
        yrs >= 1 & yrs <= 6 ~ "Primary",
        yrs >= 7 & yrs <= 12 ~ "Secondary",
        yrs > 12 ~ "Higher",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    },
    mat_literacy = NA_character_,
    mat_occupation = NA_character_,
    mat_ethnicity = NA_character_,
    mat_country = str_to_title(country_chr),
    
    # ★ CHANGED: mat_facility — uses facilitycod labels with fallbacks
    mat_facility = facility_best,
    
    mat_district = NA_character_,
    mat_urban_rural = NA_character_,
    mat_gravidity = get_col_num(df, "numpreg"),
    mat_parity = get_col_num(df, "previousbirth"),
    mat_previous_cs = get_col_num(df, "prevcaes"),
    mat_previous_stillbirth = NA_character_,
    mat_anc_visits = NA_real_,
    mat_anc_provider = NA_character_,
    mat_hiv_status = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "hivpos")),
    mat_syphilis = NA_character_,
    mat_height = NA_real_,
    mat_weight = NA_real_,
    mat_bmi = NA_real_,
    mat_muac = NA_real_,
    mat_sbp = NA_real_,
    mat_dbp = NA_real_,
    mat_hypertension = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "chrohype")),
    mat_preeclampsia = robust_yesno(get_col(df, "preeclampsia")),
    
    # ★ CHANGED: Delivery mode — dual matching
    mat_delivery_mode = mat_delivery_mode_std,
    
    # WHOMCS is facility-based: all births at hospitals
    mat_delivery_location = "Hospital",
    mat_birth_attendant = NA_character_,
    mat_prolonged_labour = NA_character_,
    mat_obstructed_labour = NA_character_,
    mat_prom = NA_character_,
    
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # SECTION 3: HOUSEHOLD SOCIOECONOMIC INDICATORS
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    
    hh_ppi_score = NA_real_,
    hh_ppi_band = NA_character_,
    hh_poverty_likelihood = NA_real_,
    hh_wealth_quintile = NA_character_,
    hh_ses_binary = NA_character_,
    hh_wall_material = NA_character_,
    hh_floor_material = NA_character_,
    hh_ownership = NA_character_,
    hh_num_rooms = NA_real_,
    hh_cooking_fuel = NA_character_,
    hh_heating_fuel = NA_character_,
    hh_lighting = NA_character_,
    hh_electricity = NA_character_,
    hh_water_source = NA_character_,
    hh_sanitation = NA_character_,
    hh_hygiene = NA_character_,
    hh_mosquito_net = NA_character_,
    hh_size = NA_real_,
    hh_monthly_income = NA_real_,
    
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # LOCATION
    # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    
    loc_country = str_to_title(country_chr),
    loc_region = who_region_chr,
    loc_district = NA_character_,
    loc_facility = facility_best,
    loc_village = NA_character_,
    loc_latitude = NA_real_,
    loc_longitude = NA_real_,
    loc_urban_rural = NA_character_,
    loc_facility_type = NA_character_
  )
  
  # ============================================================================
  # ★ POST-PROCESSING: Age at death, Study year, and mat_age_cat
  # ============================================================================
  
  # Extract days variable for age at death (WHOMCS has this directly)
  days_val <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(get_col_chr(df, "days")))
  
  result <- result %>%
    mutate(
      # Age at death: Primary = DOD - DOB; Fallback = days variable
      out_ageatdeath = case_when(
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(out_dod) & !is.na(out_dob) ~
          as.numeric(difftime(out_dod, out_dob, units = "days")),
        # Use days variable as fallback for NNDs
        out_nnd == "Yes" & !is.na(days_val) & days_val >= 0 & days_val <= 28 ~ days_val,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      # Validate age at death (must be 0-28 days for NND)
      out_ageatdeath = ifelse(!is.na(out_ageatdeath) & 
                                (out_ageatdeath < 0 | out_ageatdeath > 28),
                              NA_real_, out_ageatdeath),
      
      # Study year validation: WHOMCS was conducted 2010-2011
      # Clean anomalous years (e.g., "18029-2012" issue)
      studyyear = ifelse(is.na(studyyear) | studyyear < 2000 | studyyear > 2015,
                         NA_integer_, studyyear),
      # Fallback: try to get year from DOB if study_date parsing failed
      studyyear = ifelse(is.na(studyyear) & !is.na(yob) & yob >= 2000 & yob <= 2015,
                         yob, studyyear),
      
      # Compute mat_age_cat from mat_age
      mat_age_cat = case_when(
        is.na(mat_age) ~ NA_character_,
        mat_age < 20 ~ "<20",
        mat_age >= 20 & mat_age < 25 ~ "20-24",
        mat_age >= 25 & mat_age < 30 ~ "25-29",
        mat_age >= 30 & mat_age < 35 ~ "30-34",
        mat_age >= 35 ~ "35+",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
  
  result %>% derive_outcomes() %>% ensure_complete_schema()
}
```

# Phase 3: Run Harmonization and Combine

```{r phase3-harmonize}
cat("\n")
cat("╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗\n")
cat("║                     PHASE 3: HARMONIZATION                                  ║\n")
cat("╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\n\n")

harmonized_ncops <- harmonize_ncops(raw_ncops)
cat(sprintf("✓ NCOPS harmonized:      %s rows\n", format(nrow(harmonized_ncops), big.mark=",")))

harmonized_alert <- harmonize_alert(raw_alert)
cat(sprintf("✓ ALERT harmonized:      %s rows\n", format(nrow(harmonized_alert), big.mark=",")))

harmonized_precise <- harmonize_precise(raw_precise)
cat(sprintf("✓ PRECISE harmonized:    %s rows\n", format(nrow(harmonized_precise), big.mark=",")))

harmonized_ptbi <- harmonize_ptbi(raw_ptbi)
cat(sprintf("✓ PTBi harmonized:       %s rows\n", format(nrow(harmonized_ptbi), big.mark=",")))

harmonized_enindepth <- harmonize_enindepth(raw_enindepth)
cat(sprintf("✓ EN-INDEPTH harmonized: %s rows\n", format(nrow(harmonized_enindepth), big.mark=",")))

harmonized_whomcs <- harmonize_whomcs(raw_whomcs)
cat(sprintf("✓ WHOMCS harmonized:     %s rows\n", format(nrow(harmonized_whomcs), big.mark=",")))

# Coerce all to character to avoid type clashes across studies
coerce_types <- function(df) {
  df %>% mutate(
    across(where(is.logical), ~as.character(.x)),
    across(where(is.numeric) & !matches("mat_age|mat_weight|mat_height|mat_bmi|neo_birthweight|neo_apgar|out_ga|out_ageatdeath|out_birthweight|sample_weight"), as.character)
  )
}
harmonized_ncops     <- coerce_types(harmonized_ncops)
harmonized_alert     <- coerce_types(harmonized_alert)
harmonized_precise   <- coerce_types(harmonized_precise)
harmonized_ptbi      <- coerce_types(harmonized_ptbi)
harmonized_enindepth <- coerce_types(harmonized_enindepth)
harmonized_whomcs    <- coerce_types(harmonized_whomcs)

# Combine all datasets
unified_dataset <- bind_rows(
  harmonized_ncops,
  harmonized_alert,
  harmonized_precise,
  harmonized_ptbi,
  harmonized_enindepth,
  harmonized_whomcs
)

# Location standardisation
unified_dataset <- unified_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    loc_country = coalesce(loc_country, mat_country),
    loc_district = coalesce(loc_district, mat_district),
    loc_facility = coalesce(loc_facility, mat_facility),
    loc_urban_rural = coalesce(loc_urban_rural, mat_urban_rural),
    loc_country = case_when(
      tolower(loc_country) %in% c("gambia", "the gambia") ~ "The Gambia",
      tolower(loc_country) %in% c("guinea bissau", "guinea-bissau") ~ "Guinea-Bissau",
      TRUE ~ loc_country
    ),
    mat_country = coalesce(mat_country, loc_country)
  )

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ★ v10.9: STANDARDIZE DELIVERY LOCATION ACROSS ALL STUDIES
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Apply consistent categories: Hospital, Health center, Home, En route, Other

cat("\n── Standardizing mat_delivery_location ──\n")

# Show raw values before standardization
cat("Before standardization:\n")
print(unified_dataset %>% 
        filter(!is.na(mat_delivery_location)) %>%
        count(study_source, mat_delivery_location) %>%
        pivot_wider(names_from = study_source, values_from = n, values_fill = 0))

# Apply standardization
unified_dataset <- unified_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    mat_delivery_location = std_delivery_location(mat_delivery_location)
  )

cat("\nAfter standardization:\n")
print(unified_dataset %>% 
        filter(!is.na(mat_delivery_location)) %>%
        count(study_source, mat_delivery_location) %>%
        pivot_wider(names_from = study_source, values_from = n, values_fill = 0))

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ★ v10.11: POST-PROCESSING FUNCTIONS
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

cat("\n── Applying v10.11 Post-Processing ──\n")

# Fix #7: Apply standardized education categories
cat("  ★ Fix #7: Standardizing education categories...\n")
unified_dataset <- unified_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    mat_education = std_education(mat_education)
  )

# Fix #9: Apply standardized marital status categories
cat("  ★ Fix #9: Standardizing marital status categories...\n")
unified_dataset <- unified_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    mat_marital_status = std_marital_status(mat_marital_status)
  )

# Fix #11: DOD for stillbirths (DOD = DOB for stillbirths)
cat("  ★ Fix #11: Setting DOD = DOB for stillbirths...\n")
unified_dataset <- unified_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    out_dod = case_when(
      out_stillbirth == "Yes" & is.na(out_dod) & !is.na(out_dob) ~ out_dob,
      TRUE ~ out_dod
    )
  )

# Fix #13: Calculate conception date with source tracking
cat("  ★ Fix #13: Calculating conception dates...\n")
unified_dataset <- unified_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    conception_date_calc = case_when(
      !is.na(out_dob) & !is.na(out_ga_days) ~ out_dob - round(as.numeric(out_ga_days)),
      !is.na(out_dob) & !is.na(out_ga_weeks) ~ out_dob - round(as.numeric(out_ga_weeks) * 7),
      TRUE ~ as.Date(NA)
    ),
    conception_date = coalesce(conception_date, conception_date_calc),
    conception_date_source = case_when(
      !is.na(conception_date) & is.na(conception_date_calc) ~ "Original from study",
      is.na(conception_date) & !is.na(conception_date_calc) ~ "Calculated from DOB and GA",
      !is.na(conception_date) & !is.na(conception_date_calc) ~ "Original (verified)",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-conception_date_calc)

# Fix #15: Add hypertension staging and C-section flag
cat("  ★ Fix #15: Adding hypertension staging and C-section flag...\n")
unified_dataset <- unified_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    mat_hypertension_stage = std_hypertension_stage(
      suppressWarnings(as.numeric(mat_sbp)), 
      suppressWarnings(as.numeric(mat_dbp)), 
      mat_hypertension
    ),
    mat_csection = case_when(
      mat_delivery_mode == "Caesarean" ~ "Yes",
      mat_delivery_mode %in% c("Vaginal spontaneous", "Vaginal assisted", "Vaginal breech", "Vaginal") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Fix #16: Derive literacy from education
cat("  ★ Fix #16: Deriving literacy from education...\n")
unified_dataset <- unified_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    mat_literacy = case_when(
      !is.na(mat_literacy) & mat_literacy %in% c("Yes", "No", "Partial") ~ mat_literacy,
      mat_education %in% c("Secondary", "Higher") ~ "Yes",
      mat_education == "Primary" ~ "Partial",
      mat_education == "None" ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Fix #10: Add SGA classification summary (using existing values if available)
cat("  ★ Fix #10: Adding size for GA classification...\n")
unified_dataset <- unified_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    out_aga = case_when(
      out_sga == "No" & (out_lga == "No" | is.na(out_lga)) ~ "Yes",
      out_sga == "Yes" | out_lga == "Yes" ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_sizeforGA = case_when(
      out_sga == "Yes" ~ "SGA (<10th centile)",
      out_lga == "Yes" ~ "LGA (>90th centile)",
      out_aga == "Yes" ~ "AGA (10th-90th centile)",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    out_dob_source = case_when(
      !is.na(out_dob) ~ "Available",
      TRUE ~ "Missing"
    )
  )

# Fix #6: Final pass to ensure early/late NND consistency
cat("  ★ Fix #6: Final NND timing consistency check...\n")
unified_dataset <- unified_dataset %>%
  mutate(
    out_nnd_early = case_when(
      out_nnd != "Yes" & out_nnd_early == "Yes" ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ out_nnd_early
    ),
    out_nnd_late = case_when(
      out_nnd != "Yes" & out_nnd_late == "Yes" ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ out_nnd_late
    )
  )

cat("  ✓ v10.11 post-processing complete\n")

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# v10.11 VERIFICATION CHECKS
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

cat("\n── v10.11 Verification Checks ──\n")

# Check Fix #7: Education categories
cat("\n★ Fix #7 - Education Categories:\n")
print(unified_dataset %>% count(mat_education) %>% arrange(desc(n)))

# Check Fix #8: Delivery mode (should NOT have "Instrumental")
cat("\n★ Fix #8 - Delivery Mode Categories:\n")
print(unified_dataset %>% count(mat_delivery_mode) %>% arrange(desc(n)))
if ("Instrumental" %in% unique(unified_dataset$mat_delivery_mode)) {
  warning("⚠ 'Instrumental' still present in mat_delivery_mode!")
} else {
  cat("  ✓ No 'Instrumental' - 'Vaginal assisted' used instead\n")
}

# Check Fix #9: Marital status
cat("\n★ Fix #9 - Marital Status Categories:\n")
print(unified_dataset %>% count(mat_marital_status) %>% arrange(desc(n)))

# Check Fix #6: Early/Late NND consistency
cat("\n★ Fix #6 - Early/Late NND Consistency:\n")
inconsistent_early <- sum(unified_dataset$out_nnd == "No" & unified_dataset$out_nnd_early == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE)
inconsistent_late <- sum(unified_dataset$out_nnd == "No" & unified_dataset$out_nnd_late == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE)
cat(sprintf("  Inconsistent early NND: %d (should be 0)\n", inconsistent_early))
cat(sprintf("  Inconsistent late NND: %d (should be 0)\n", inconsistent_late))

# Check Fix #15: Hypertension staging
cat("\n★ Fix #15 - Hypertension Staging:\n")
print(unified_dataset %>% filter(!is.na(mat_hypertension_stage)) %>% 
        count(study_source, mat_hypertension_stage) %>%
        pivot_wider(names_from = mat_hypertension_stage, values_from = n, values_fill = 0))

cat(sprintf("\n=== UNIFIED DATASET: %s total rows, %s columns ===\n", 
            format(nrow(unified_dataset), big.mark=","), ncol(unified_dataset)))


# ── v10.13: GA Method Verification ──
cat("\n── out_ga_method by study_source ──\n")
print(
  unified_dataset %>%
    count(study_source, out_ga_method) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = study_source, values_from = n, values_fill = 0))

# ── v10.12/v10.13: Study Design & Module Verification ──
cat("\n── study_design × module by study_source ──\n")
print(
  unified_dataset %>%
    count(study_source, study_design, module) %>%
    arrange(study_source))
# ── Wealth Quintile Verification ──
cat("\n── Wealth Quintile Distribution by Study ──\n")
wq_summary <- unified_dataset %>%
  filter(!is.na(hh_wealth_quintile)) %>%
  count(study_source, hh_wealth_quintile) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = hh_wealth_quintile, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
if (nrow(wq_summary) > 0) {
  print(kable(wq_summary, caption = "hh_wealth_quintile by Study"))
} else {
  cat("  (No wealth quintile data found — check SES file merges)\n")
}

saveRDS(unified_dataset, "intermediate/phase3_unified.rds")
```

# Phase 4: Identifier Tracking

```{r phase4-identifiers}
cat("\n")
cat("╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗\n")
cat("║                     PHASE 4: IDENTIFIER TRACKING                            ║\n")
cat("╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\n\n")

identifier_data <- unified_dataset %>%
  select(unified_id, study_source, raw_id, raw_id_secondary) %>%
  mutate(created_date = Sys.Date(), pipeline_version = VERSION)

saveRDS(identifier_data, "intermediate/phase4_identifiers.rds")
write_csv(identifier_data, "output/identifier_tracking.csv")
cat(sprintf("✓ Created identifier tracking: %s rows\n", format(nrow(identifier_data), big.mark=",")))
```

# Phase 5: Data Quality Summary

```{r phase5-quality}
cat("\n")
cat("╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗\n")
cat("║                     PHASE 5: DATA QUALITY SUMMARY                           ║\n")
cat("╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\n\n")

study_summary <- unified_dataset %>%
  group_by(study_source) %>%
  summarise(
    n_records = n(),
    n_countries = n_distinct(mat_country, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_stillbirth = round(100 * mean(out_stillbirth == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    pct_nnd = round(100 * mean(out_nnd == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    pct_ga_complete = round(100 * mean(!is.na(out_ga_weeks)), 1),
    pct_bw_complete = round(100 * mean(!is.na(out_birthweight_g)), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(kable(study_summary, caption = "Study-Level Summary"))

# ============================================================================
# ★ VERIFICATION TABLES FOR v10.8 FIXES
# ============================================================================

cat("\n\n═══ VERIFICATION: Infant Sex by Study ═══\n")
sex_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  count(study_source, out_infant_sex) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = out_infant_sex, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
print(kable(sex_check, caption = "Infant Sex Distribution (check ALERT/WHOMCS have both sexes)"))

cat("\n\n═══ VERIFICATION: Study Year Range by Study ═══\n")
year_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  group_by(study_source) %>%
  summarise(
    min_year = min(studyyear, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_year = max(studyyear, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_missing = sum(is.na(studyyear)),
    pct_complete = round(100 * mean(!is.na(studyyear)), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(kable(year_check, caption = "Study Year Range (check WHOMCS is 2010-2011)"))

cat("\n\n═══ VERIFICATION: Early/Late NND by Study ═══\n")
nnd_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  filter(out_nnd == "Yes") %>%
  count(study_source, out_nnd_early, out_nnd_late) %>%
  arrange(study_source)
print(kable(nnd_check, caption = "Early/Late NND Classification for NNDs"))

cat("\n\n═══ VERIFICATION: Age at Death Summary for NNDs ═══\n")
age_death_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  filter(out_nnd == "Yes") %>%
  group_by(study_source) %>%
  summarise(
    n_nnd = n(),
    n_with_age = sum(!is.na(out_ageatdeath)),
    pct_age_known = round(100 * mean(!is.na(out_ageatdeath)), 1),
    mean_age_days = round(mean(out_ageatdeath, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    median_age_days = median(out_ageatdeath, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(kable(age_death_check, caption = "Age at Death for NNDs (check ALERT/WHOMCS have values)"))

cat("\n\n═══ VERIFICATION: Maternal Age Category by Study ═══\n")
agecat_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  count(study_source, mat_age_cat) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = mat_age_cat, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
print(kable(agecat_check, caption = "Maternal Age Category Distribution"))

cat("\n\n═══ VERIFICATION: Education Level by Study ═══\n")
edu_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  filter(!is.na(mat_education)) %>%
  count(study_source, mat_education) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = mat_education, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
if (nrow(edu_check) > 0) {
  print(kable(edu_check, caption = "Education Distribution (check WHOMCS has categories not years)"))
}

cat("\n\n═══ VERIFICATION: Ethnicity Completeness by Study ═══\n")
eth_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  group_by(study_source) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_with_ethnicity = sum(!is.na(mat_ethnicity) & mat_ethnicity != ""),
    pct_complete = round(100 * mean(!is.na(mat_ethnicity) & mat_ethnicity != ""), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(kable(eth_check, caption = "Ethnicity Completeness (check EN-INDEPTH has values)"))

# ============================================================================
# ★ VERIFICATION TABLES FOR v10.9 FIXES
# ============================================================================

cat("\n\n═══ v10.9: DOB Completeness by Study ═══\n")
dob_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  group_by(study_source) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_with_dob = sum(!is.na(out_dob)),
    pct_complete = round(100 * mean(!is.na(out_dob)), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(kable(dob_check, caption = "DOB Completeness (check EN-INDEPTH now has values)"))

cat("\n\n═══ v10.9: DOD Completeness by Study ═══\n")
dod_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  group_by(study_source) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_with_dod = sum(!is.na(out_dod)),
    pct_complete = round(100 * mean(!is.na(out_dod)), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(kable(dod_check, caption = "DOD Completeness (check EN-INDEPTH now has values)"))

cat("\n\n═══ v10.9: Hypertension by Study ═══\n")
hyp_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  count(study_source, mat_hypertension) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = mat_hypertension, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
print(kable(hyp_check, caption = "Hypertension (check ALERT now has Yes/No values)"))

cat("\n\n═══ v10.9: Delivery Location by Study ═══\n")
delloc_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  filter(!is.na(mat_delivery_location)) %>%
  count(study_source, mat_delivery_location) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = mat_delivery_location, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
if (nrow(delloc_check) > 0) {
  print(kable(delloc_check, caption = "Delivery Location (check ALERT has referral status)"))
}

cat("\n\n═══ v10.11: Birth Attendant by Study ═══\n")
attendant_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  filter(!is.na(mat_birth_attendant)) %>%
  count(study_source, mat_birth_attendant) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = mat_birth_attendant, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
if (nrow(attendant_check) > 0) {
  print(kable(attendant_check, caption = "Birth Attendant (check PRECISE now has values)"))
}

cat("\n\n═══ v10.11: Stillbirth Thresholds by Study ═══\n")
sb_threshold_check <- unified_dataset %>%
  filter(out_stillbirth == "Yes") %>%
  group_by(study_source) %>%
  summarise(
    n_stillbirths = n(),
    n_sb_28wks = sum(out_stillbirth_28wks == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sb_20wks = sum(out_stillbirth_20wks == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_28wks = round(100 * mean(out_stillbirth_28wks == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    pct_20wks = round(100 * mean(out_stillbirth_20wks == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(kable(sb_threshold_check, caption = "Stillbirth Thresholds (computed from GA)"))
```

# Phase 6: Export Final Dataset

```{r phase6-export}
cat("\n")
cat("╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗\n")
cat("║                     PHASE 6: EXPORT FINAL DATASET                           ║\n")
cat("╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\n\n")

saveRDS(unified_dataset, sprintf("output/unified_dataset_v%s.rds", VERSION))
write_csv(unified_dataset, sprintf("output/unified_dataset_v%s.csv", VERSION))
haven::write_dta(unified_dataset, sprintf("output/unified_dataset_v%s.dta", VERSION))

# Data dictionary
data_dict <- tibble(
  variable = ALL_SCHEMA_VARS,
  section = case_when(
    variable %in% SCHEMA$identifiers ~ "Identifiers",
    variable %in% SCHEMA$outcomes ~ "Outcomes",
    variable %in% SCHEMA$maternal ~ "Maternal",
    variable %in% SCHEMA$household ~ "Household",
    variable %in% SCHEMA$location ~ "Location",
    variable %in% SCHEMA$temporal ~ "Temporal",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
)
write_csv(data_dict, sprintf("output/unified_dataset_v%s_data_dictionary.csv", VERSION))

cat("✓ Saved all outputs to output/ folder\n")
cat("\n")
cat("════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("                      PIPELINE COMPLETE v", VERSION, "\n", sep = "")
cat("════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat(sprintf("Total Records: %s\n", format(nrow(unified_dataset), big.mark=",")))
cat(sprintf("Total Variables: %s\n", ncol(unified_dataset)))
cat(sprintf("Studies: %s\n", paste(unique(unified_dataset$study_source), collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Countries: %s\n", n_distinct(unified_dataset$mat_country, na.rm = TRUE)))
```
